Unfortunately, we're still a little short of where we'd need to be by now to hit our fundraising goal by tomorrow's midnight FEC deadline.

But we can make up the difference if 131 people from Pennsylvania chip in right now.

**If you'd be able to make a contribution, can you be one of the 131?

[Please chip in $2 or whatever you can to help get this team back on track to hit our goal. You'll help elect Democrats like Elizabeth across the country in 2020, and help grow the grassroots movement that will make real change in 2021 and beyond.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250bf/45c30650/1cffcd900/66e9b91d/2981479502/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzI5Rl9FT1FfTUNHX0NfMjAyMDA2MjlfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS29F_EOQ_MCG_C_20200629_V1S3_P")**

Every month and every quarter, we set fundraising goals to cover the investments we need to make in grassroots, person-to-person organizing.

Those investments will lead Warren Democrats to victory in November and power the fight for big, structural change for years to come.

But they're only possible with the support of grassroots donors like you.

**[If it makes sense for you right now, will you be one of the 131 who helps hit this critical goal?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250bf/45c30650/1cffcd900/66e9b91d/2981479502/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzI5Rl9FT1FfTUNHX0NfMjAyMDA2MjlfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS29F_EOQ_MCG_C_20200629_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

name: ChristyforCongress.org
subject: ICYMI: We were downgraded TWICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed224/663897272/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")
---

| | | _Did you see this important fundraising update, Peter?_

**[Christy has a crucial end-of-quarter deadline coming up at midnight TOMORROW, and she won't hit her fundraising goal without your support. Rush a donation of $5 or more now. Time is running out.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed225/663897272/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full")** [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed225/663897272/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full")
---

\----------FORWARDED EMAIL----------
FROM: Finance Team (via ChristyForCongress.org)
SUBJECT: We were downgraded TWICE
SENT: Wed, June 24

Here's the deal, Peter --

The end of the quarter is on the 30th, and it's a _major_ fundraising deadline for our grassroots campaign. Our first for the general election. **But to be honest, we're falling short of our goal.**

Last month our race was downgraded by campaign experts -- _twice_. This month, we have to step it up.

That means we need to do more than meet our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal. **We have to crush it.**

**[Anything you're able to give will help push us over the finish line and build up the momentum we need to win in November. Can you chip in $5 or more right now so we don't fall behind?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed225/663897272/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed226/663897272/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed227/663897272/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed220/663897272/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed221/663897272/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed222/663897272/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed225/663897272/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full")
It's critical to the success of this campaign that we make a strong showing with our end-of-quarter fundraising -- because Mike Garcia and his Republican boosters will get to see our numbers. We _have_ to show them that this grassroots team is only getting stronger, and that we have the momentum we need to win.

**It's time to show Garcia, his rich and powerful allies, and everyone else _exactly what we're made of._**

**[Show our opponents that we have what it takes to send Garcia packing. Chip in $5 or more towards Team Christy's end-of-quarter goal -- before time runs out.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed225/663897272/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full")**

We got this,

Lexie

Finance Director
Christy Smith for Congress

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed225/663897272/VEsHBw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed225/663897272/VEsHBg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjlfZW9xOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200629_eoq8-full")
---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed224/663897272/VEsHAQ/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed223/663897272/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba29/29776869/9ca7b1c/569ed23c/663897272/VEsHAw/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: MJ Hegar Battleground HQ
subject: two scenarios after the runoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Which one will it be?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489016d/7f51f7bc/4165aae8/4ef623f3/1600472161/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489016d/7f51f7bc/4165aae8/4ef623f1/1600472161/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200629.2nd__1621__&amount=10")
---
Peter -- MJ just got off the debate stage and now we're coming up on our **FINAL end-of-quarter goal before the runoff election,** and the way we see it, there are two different scenarios for how this race shakes out from here:
**Scenario 1:** We hit this goal, win the runoff, and **head into the general election against Sen. Cornyn with the momentum we need** to fight back against his big money attacks and WIN!

**Scenario 2:** We come up short and aren't able to defend against all the money coming in from the Koch network and other special interests. **Sen. Cornyn wins another term and spends six more years putting Mitch McConnell and big money donors ahead of working Texas families.**
When the FEC reports are filed after this quarter ends, experts everywhere will use them to determine our chances of winning in November. WE know we can do it -- but we need to make sure everyone else does too!

**Remember, all donations before Tuesday 's midnight deadline are being matched. So please pitch in now to help us make sure Scenario 1 comes true -- we'll send you a Team MJ sticker as thanks!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5 (Becomes $10!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489016d/7f51f7bc/4165aae8/4ef623f7/1600472161/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200629.2nd__1621__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10 (Becomes $20!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489016d/7f51f7bc/4165aae8/4ef623f6/1600472161/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200629.2nd__1621__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25 (Becomes $50!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489016d/7f51f7bc/4165aae8/4ef623f4/1600472161/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200629.2nd__1621__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50 (Becomes $100!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489016d/7f51f7bc/4165aae8/4ef623e9/1600472161/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200629.2nd__1621__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489016d/7f51f7bc/4165aae8/4ef623ef/1600472161/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200629.2nd__1621__")**
\-- MJ Hegar HQ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489016d/7f51f7bc/4165aae8/4ef623f1/1600472161/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200629.2nd__1621__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489016d/7f51f7bc/4165aae8/4ef623ed/1600472161/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1621&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489016d/7f51f7bc/4165aae8/4ef623ec/1600472161/VEsHBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

Round Rock, TX 78683

When the FEC reports are filed after this quarter ends, experts everywhere will use them to determine our chances of winning in November. WE know we can do it -- but we need to make sure everyone else does too! Remember, all donations before Tuesday 's midnight deadline are being matched. So please pitch in now to help us make sure Scenario 1 comes true -- we'll send you a Team MJ sticker as thanks! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" \-- MJ Hegar HQ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

body:
Hey Peter! Just sending a quick reminder about our watch party tomorrow night! Join us after heading to the polls! We'll be at the **Bank7 Event Center at 7:00 p.m.** We can’t wait to see you there. If you missed it, be sure to check out your original invite below, and don't forget to vote tomorrow! \- David Hill \-------Forwarded message-------
From: David Hill
Date: June 29th, 2020
Subject: Let's Watch Together! Dear Peter, As you know, June 30th is critically important to the future of our district, state, and country. I want to thank you all for your dedication to Team Hill leading up to these Oklahoma primary elections. Your continued support to our mission and campaign cannot be overstated. After you head out to the polling station to cast your vote, I want to personally invite you to our **_David Hill for Congress Primary Election Watch Party_! ** **As a fundamental supporter of our campaign, I want you to be there to celebrate with us!** | |
---
|
---
Please join us at the **Bank7 Event Center at 7:00 p.m. on Tuesday, June 30th**.

Thank you again for your continued support. I hope to see you on Tuesday night!

Sincerely,

David Hill

body:
| Derek-- Over the past few weeks, we've been working 'round the clock to fight back against outside groups who are trying to influence New Hampshire's elections.

Fact: if we're going to flip New Hampshire's First Congressional District from blue to red, we can't let them win.

While we're fighting back, we HAVE to show them we mean business by tomorrow at midnight -- when reporting will show how much we've raised versus our opponents.

We HAVE to show the grassroots support in the report for the quarter that _I know_ we have. After hosting countless events, showing up in neighborhoods, and pushing to get the word out, we've got amazing support. But that has to show up on paper, too!

body:
Friends, Have you ever seen the movie The Purge? The one where all crime is legal for one night a year and violence runs rampant. It was scary when it was just a fictional movie, but now New York City is one big leap closer to making The Purge a reality.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=194A289A1A3769)

| | Friends-

Have you ever seen the movie The Purge? The one where all crime is legal for one night a year and violence runs rampant. It was scary when it was just a fictional movie, but now New York City is one big leap closer to making The Purge a reality.

Yesterday, wacko mayor Bill de Blasio announced he was caving to Max Rose and the other extreme leftists’ demand and cutting $1 billion from the NYPD budget.

That one billion dollars is enough to fund EVERY SINGLE POLICE OFFICER in my district and a handful of other districts.

[Help us stop them before it's too late.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=194A289A1A3770)

---
| | |
---
| | If this Max Rose/Bill de Blasio "defund the police" scheme actually happens we could be left without any police officers in all of Staten Island and Brooklyn.

Imagine picking up the phone, dialing 9-1-1, and hearing that you’re on your own because there are no more police officers. None.

If you think this type of thing could only happen in New York City and nowhere else, think again. Socialists are winning in cities across the country.

We have to take a stand, we have to stop these radical liberals before they succeed in implementing policies that release criminals onto our streets and eliminate the police officers who help keep our neighborhoods safe.

I’m fighting back, you know that. And I know you’re already with me, but we need to get the word out before it is too late. Forward this email to as many friends and family members as you can so we can get the word our and build support.

[Then chip in $25, $50, or even $100 so we can keep pushing our message of safe neighborhoods and win in November before Max Rose and Bill de Blaiso completely destroy our city, state, and country.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=194A289A1A3770)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Phase 3 starts today
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Rhode Island is one of just two states in the country that are continuing to see declines in new cases. We're in this position today because of the hard work and sacrifices you've all made. Because of you, it's safe to move into Phase 3 today.
I'm excited to share with you what Phase 3 will look like, but first, I'd like to share with you a [special message](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bq9RzJ-GivLQm4ciSchSGErLMwNuXb2H_LMiUWeOKqpgfjkMKeTWEA0qwi9Gktp-9VyztQUljOR2kBBlzRauxSu8xeVJcuHAsN0CUyRzR9LhFnPXVQO7_gw9gBM2V5ldwIqM8yEIhUn3uNTJr_VbVg==&c=bi9-Gp1Xw-uCGnW6F588UrZNFVs_Magrj2z4ezwB7ivZHm7hq8wWBg==&ch=WxzXZlX2C79eHNZ_pFQILF_zxFWreW8jF9PpFaRKZpz24gd497tdTg==) about moving forward:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bq9RzJ-GivLQm4ciSchSGErLMwNuXb2H_LMiUWeOKqpgfjkMKeTWEA0qwi9Gktp-9VyztQUljOR2kBBlzRauxSu8xeVJcuHAsN0CUyRzR9LhFnPXVQO7_gw9gBM2V5ldwIqM8yEIhUn3uNTJr_VbVg==&c=bi9-Gp1Xw-uCGnW6F588UrZNFVs_Magrj2z4ezwB7ivZHm7hq8wWBg==&ch=WxzXZlX2C79eHNZ_pFQILF_zxFWreW8jF9PpFaRKZpz24gd497tdTg==)
---
| This virus thrives in big crowds, and knowing what we know now, it's not safe yet to have really large gatherings. You can always see the latest regulation on [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bq9RzJ-GivLQm4ciSchSGErLMwNuXb2H_LMiUWeOKqpgfjkMKeTWEMFNhIhG6I01PIYKmFTvLehddlqfZRaLu5DOxK-EaBH51fUz6b9Zl0KvqLRhjKfR6BFADdvGPm9FV1ztsUoMdMpMQqhNUlamrg==&c=bi9-Gp1Xw-uCGnW6F588UrZNFVs_Magrj2z4ezwB7ivZHm7hq8wWBg==&ch=WxzXZlX2C79eHNZ_pFQILF_zxFWreW8jF9PpFaRKZpz24gd497tdTg==). Here's what Phase 3 will look like:
Gatherings:
* Social gatherings can be no larger than 25 people indoors or 50 people outdoors.
* For social gatherings like weddings, where the setting more closely resembles a restaurant, you can have up to 50 people indoors or up to 100 people outdoors.
* For events that are open to the public, like concerts and festivals, you can have up to 125 people indoors or up to 250 people outdoors. We're also going to be requiring anyone who is planning to bring more than 100 people together to submit a plan.
* These limits will apply to all venues of assembly, including religious institutions.

Businesses:
* All indoor settings operating at a square footage capacity can increase up to 1 person per 100 square feet provided that everyone maintains 6-feet of social distance. This includes things like retail stores.
* All indoor settings currently operating at a percent capacity cap can increase up to 66% capacity provided that everyone maintains 6-feet of social distance. This includes things like offices and restaurants.
* Nearly all indoor venues that were closed in Phase 2 can open. This includes things like movie theaters, bowling alleys, arcades and museums. Seated venues can open at up to 66% capacity, and free-flowing venues can open at 100 square feet per person provided that everyone maintains 6-feet of social distance.

---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bq9RzJ-GivLQm4ciSchSGErLMwNuXb2H_LMiUWeOKqpgfjkMKeTWEMOfTb-pfjb6rV8h_wtvv9PVmVjZDSvvYjfBQDEaSOue1e6qHDWeKj3n-sfwkzmOzJzkl8trr3-IcxUVUQRlZyW8UKUKrRea65ninr7NgVj6ZbvsVk2edAS5g_-LYIaHo9j3ONQ2fB1RogJ3LtKxWTc=&c=bi9-Gp1Xw-uCGnW6F588UrZNFVs_Magrj2z4ezwB7ivZHm7hq8wWBg==&ch=WxzXZlX2C79eHNZ_pFQILF_zxFWreW8jF9PpFaRKZpz24gd497tdTg==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bq9RzJ-GivLQm4ciSchSGErLMwNuXb2H_LMiUWeOKqpgfjkMKeTWEMOfTb-pfjb6rV8h_wtvv9PVmVjZDSvvYjfBQDEaSOue1e6qHDWeKj3n-sfwkzmOzJzkl8trr3-IcxUVUQRlZyW8UKUKrRea65ninr7NgVj6ZbvsVk2edAS5g_-LYIaHo9j3ONQ2fB1RogJ3LtKxWTc=&c=bi9-Gp1Xw-uCGnW6F588UrZNFVs_Magrj2z4ezwB7ivZHm7hq8wWBg==&ch=WxzXZlX2C79eHNZ_pFQILF_zxFWreW8jF9PpFaRKZpz24gd497tdTg==).
---
| I also want to talk for a moment about domestic travel in Phase 3. We want to continue to allow people to come here, but we want to prioritize health and safety. We will have a mandatory 14-day quarantine for anyone coming to Rhode Island from any state with 5% or greater positivity rate. The list of states that fall into this category can be found [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bq9RzJ-GivLQm4ciSchSGErLMwNuXb2H_LMiUWeOKqpgfjkMKeTWEA0qwi9Gktp-BdhpliA44lhzagZaY1Ef_dH3lXhxGLxmH4VrY_7711tqoeTwLfkVAMC9zAoKFHOrTz4P46wRM1agf0RhFKzSDtROb3XYzQQWzjddPSEza_zaPNlvOuEpWJO-bqtP278A3G-j6sRnz1O5ci6GCPQ45Zr7wMLuWjTGIbnafuWya3ccc-gNvZVYxEj63OERcT2LIBP0H1H6RyRrxTepzro4GPpbYwu7ioE5h2FveG3qu5307ld3jYcZv8J3O_TjtIrDqcHpaLBfqEUaWL9H4wHBfw==&c=bi9-Gp1Xw-uCGnW6F588UrZNFVs_Magrj2z4ezwB7ivZHm7hq8wWBg==&ch=WxzXZlX2C79eHNZ_pFQILF_zxFWreW8jF9PpFaRKZpz24gd497tdTg==). This list will be updated weekly. As an exception to that rule, you will not have to quarantine if you have had a negative coronavirus test within the past 72 hours.
If you are a Rhode Islander who travels to a place with a 5% or greater positivity rate, you should quarantine for 14 days. As an exception, you will be eligible to sign up for an asymptomatic test by going to[portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bq9RzJ-GivLQm4ciSchSGErLMwNuXb2H_LMiUWeOKqpgfjkMKeTWEGn3dfVpLAQoMNTH_DyysLkqsqFb9YhculmZEMc1QK71jhaB63fE5fWzo0hl1SF-fSaLNxbghNh-WhxhFeGmtxg=&c=bi9-Gp1Xw-uCGnW6F588UrZNFVs_Magrj2z4ezwB7ivZHm7hq8wWBg==&ch=WxzXZlX2C79eHNZ_pFQILF_zxFWreW8jF9PpFaRKZpz24gd497tdTg==). If you test negative, you won't have to quarantine. And by the way, I'd suggest that now is a great time to stay local. Explore the beauty we have right here in Rhode Island this summer - with a mask on and social distancing guidelines followed.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bq9RzJ-GivLQm4ciSchSGErLMwNuXb2H_LMiUWeOKqpgfjkMKeTWEA0qwi9Gktp-zL602YhnXLW8Z6K92wgL95-p8wBexdv3Fr6FNsIZjdpsP50hFMXUguUrBPAzMxn0n3Cwbn2fN1jLnZ3rT7Wwz1M5p0oTlMI9tBL0BWOa27acmiUA2kdiFt8vpa_66Nl7MWU5GrKD55s=&c=bi9-Gp1Xw-uCGnW6F588UrZNFVs_Magrj2z4ezwB7ivZHm7hq8wWBg==&ch=WxzXZlX2C79eHNZ_pFQILF_zxFWreW8jF9PpFaRKZpz24gd497tdTg==)

| There's no question that we're dealing with extremely complex, unprecedented situation. We will forge a path forward that protects health and safety while allowing Rhode Islanders to get back to work. I want you to know that I'm continuing to take a thoughtful, targeted and data-driven approach to every decision that I make. And right now, the data is telling us it's safe to move forward so long as we remain committed to wearing out masks, maintaining social distance, etc. So if you're wondering if it's really safe to go out to eat or go to a store, I want you to know that it is. We just need you to keep wearing your mask and keeping your distance.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, Rhode Island is one of just two states in the country that are continuing to see declines in new cases. We're in this position today because of the hard work and sacrifices you've all made. Because of you, it's safe to move into Phase 3 today. I'm excited to share with you what Phase 3 will look like, but first, I'd like to share with you a == about moving forward: | == | This virus thrives in big crowds, and knowing what we know now, it's not safe yet to have really large gatherings. You can always see the latest regulation on ==. Here's what Phase 3 will look like: Gatherings: Social gatherings can be no larger than 25 people indoors or 50 people outdoors. For social gatherings like weddings, where the setting more closely resembles a restaurant, you can have up to 50 people indoors or up to 100 people outdoors. For events that are open to the public, like concerts and festivals, you can have up to 125 people indoors or up to 250 people outdoors. We're also going to be requiring anyone who is planning to bring more than 100 people together to submit a plan. These limits will apply to all venues of assembly, including religious institutions. Businesses: All indoor settings operating at a square footage capacity can increase up to 1 person per 100 square feet provided that everyone maintains 6-feet of social distance. This includes things like retail stores. All indoor settings currently operating at a percent capacity cap can increase up to 66% capacity provided that everyone maintains 6-feet of social distance. This includes things like offices and restaurants. * Nearly all indoor venues that were closed in Phase 2 can open. This includes things like movie theaters, bowling alleys, arcades and museums. Seated venues can open at up to 66% capacity, and free-flowing venues can open at 100 square feet per person provided that everyone maintains 6-feet of social distance. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | I also want to talk for a moment about domestic travel in Phase 3. We want to continue to allow people to come here, but we want to prioritize health and safety. We will have a mandatory 14-day quarantine for anyone coming to Rhode Island from any state with 5% or greater positivity rate. The list of states that fall into this category can be found ==. This list will be updated weekly. As an exception to that rule, you will not have to quarantine if you have had a negative coronavirus test within the past 72 hours. If you are a Rhode Islander who travels to a place with a 5% or greater positivity rate, you should quarantine for 14 days. As an exception, you will be eligible to sign up for an asymptomatic test by going to==. If you test negative, you won't have to quarantine. And by the way, I'd suggest that now is a great time to stay local. Explore the beauty we have right here in Rhode Island this summer - with a mask on and social distancing guidelines followed. | == | There's no question that we're dealing with extremely complex, unprecedented situation. We will forge a path forward that protects health and safety while allowing Rhode Islanders to get back to work. I want you to know that I'm continuing to take a thoughtful, targeted and data-driven approach to every decision that I make. And right now, the data is telling us it's safe to move forward so long as we remain committed to wearing out masks, maintaining social distance, etc. So if you're wondering if it's really safe to go out to eat or go to a store, I want you to know that it is. We just need you to keep wearing your mask and keeping your distance. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 6/29
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, We've had another great week on the road meeting folks around the state and talking about the issues that matter. This past week back on the road, I enjoyed spending time in Lawrence, Lewis, Wayne, Giles, Marshall, Bedford, Franklin, Polk, Monroe, Hamilton, Cheatham, Williamson, Montgomery, Sullivan, Knox, Coffee, Madison, and Shelby Counties. I hope you'll join me at one of our next townhalls near you. On Saturday I opened up 7 offices across the state in Kingsport, Knoxville, Chattanooga, Nashville, Jackson, Shelby and my hometown of Coffee County. It was such an honor to open up these offices across the state as it shows our movement gaining serious momentum. If you would like to pick up a yard sign or a sticker, swing by your local office! What is also concerning is the liberal hypocrisy that we are seeing at every corner. You can't go to church, but this looting and rioting is okay? [Watch my new ad here!](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-j/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-t/) **Events:** This week, I'll be doing townhalls in Putnam, Rutherford, and Madison Counties. I'll be sharing why I'm running for the Senate and taking your questions. I hope you'll join us! Stay up to date with where we'll be next at [DrMannyForSenate.com/Events](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-i/).
**News:** Last week, I was honored to receive former Congressman Zach Wamp's endorsement. Congressman Wamp has been a great leader of the conservative movement in Washington, Chattanooga, and across Tennessee. I thoroughly respect his ideals and his vision for the future of the conservative party. [Read up on the full endorsement here.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-d/) I'm grateful to WJHL in the Tri-Cities for coming to cover my office opening in Kingsport. [Watch the report here.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-h/) **Social Media:** I was joined by Congressman Tim Burchett and Mayor Glenn Jacobs at my office opening in Knoxville on Saturday. I appreciated them introducing me to one of the many great crowds we received across the state. It's going to be a great Summer and I look forward to seeing you out on the road! Keep an eye on our [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-k/) and [drmannyforsenate.com/events](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-u/) to see where I'll be next! Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-o/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-b/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-n/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! I believe Tennesseans should meet their next US Senator, and why I hope to see you soon. Dr. Manny P.S. There are only 38 days until Election Day![ A donation right now will help me reach the US Senate and be a true representative of YOU, instead of a Washington insider. ](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-p/) [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkthglk-olhhkyhhid-x/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

clean_body: | | ---|---|--- | Friends, We've had another great week on the road meeting folks around the state and talking about the issues that matter. This past week back on the road, I enjoyed spending time in Lawrence, Lewis, Wayne, Giles, Marshall, Bedford, Franklin, Polk, Monroe, Hamilton, Cheatham, Williamson, Montgomery, Sullivan, Knox, Coffee, Madison, and Shelby Counties. I hope you'll join me at one of our next townhalls near you. On Saturday I opened up 7 offices across the state in Kingsport, Knoxville, Chattanooga, Nashville, Jackson, Shelby and my hometown of Coffee County. It was such an honor to open up these offices across the state as it shows our movement gaining serious momentum. If you would like to pick up a yard sign or a sticker, swing by your local office! What is also concerning is the liberal hypocrisy that we are seeing at every corner. You can't go to church, but this looting and rioting is okay? Events: This week, I'll be doing townhalls in Putnam, Rutherford, and Madison Counties. I'll be sharing why I'm running for the Senate and taking your questions. I hope you'll join us! Stay up to date with where we'll be next at . News: Last week, I was honored to receive former Congressman Zach Wamp's endorsement. Congressman Wamp has been a great leader of the conservative movement in Washington, Chattanooga, and across Tennessee. I thoroughly respect his ideals and his vision for the future of the conservative party. I'm grateful to WJHL in the Tri-Cities for coming to cover my office opening in Kingsport. Social Media: I was joined by Congressman Tim Burchett and Mayor Glenn Jacobs at my office opening in Knoxville on Saturday. I appreciated them introducing me to one of the many great crowds we received across the state. It's going to be a great Summer and I look forward to seeing you out on the road! Keep an eye on our and to see where I'll be next! Follow us on , , and to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! I believe Tennesseans should meet their next US Senator, and why I hope to see you soon. Dr. Manny P.S. There are only 38 days until Election Day Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved. Dear Friend, With COVID-19 cases escalating rapidly, I urge you all to enjoy the upcoming July 4th holiday in the safest possible manner. Maintain social distancing, avoid prolonged indoor gatherings, and please wear your mask when in public. There's another risk we need to be aware of - the risk of letting Pete Sessions sneak back into Congress. Sessions served in Congress from 1997 to 2019. Over that span he:
* Supported the 1033 program, allowing transfer of surplus military equipment to local law enforcement agencies
* Opposed allowing states to determine their own cannabis policies
* Supported a plan to dismantle the Office of Congressional Ethics
* Voted against the DREAM Act
* Voted repeatedly to repeal the ACA, and remove protections for pre-existing conditions, with no suitable replacement

Essentially, the exact opposite of my positions. We can't let him sneak back into Congress and pick up where he left off. **Friend, can you chip in $5, $10, or even $20 to help us meet our quarterly goal and beat Pete in November? name: Betsy Rader
subject: The court's decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Ohio's state legislature, like other extremist state legislatures, keeps fighting for ever-more outrageous laws that violate Roe v. Wade, even though that decision has been binding precedent at the national level for over 50 years now. Fortunately, just yesterday, the Supreme Court ruled Louisiana's law restricting access to abortions unconstitutional. This is a huge win for women's reproductive freedoms, _but one that should not have passed at the state level at all. _ **_This is one reason your state legislature matters._ **It matters to have elected representatives who will protect reproductive freedom, who won't interfere in women's medical decisions and who will respect the physician-patient relationship. **On these issues, I stand in direct opposition to my opponent, who is the head of Cleveland Right to Life, and who has pledged to continue the fight to erode women's rights in Ohio if he is elected to the State Senate.** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qEyMxW4-d23udOpq_3TR4FK4hJP4S8huQ9EbeMaP4Ws=/QB5KSTnb6xkJYieDKtBuZTzweerVp5D-2AdZ1MMYyz0=?soid=1102276802798&aid=2c_BGs1h9ZE) _A donation today in support of my pro-choice campaign would help us get our message out. It 's the last day of our fundraising quarter, and a strong finish shows that Ohio is not willing to go backwards on this or any other rights._ Let's take a moment to celebrate the Supreme Court decision, and then we keep fighting! Thanks so much for your support. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qEyMxW4-d23udOpq_3TR4FK4hJP4S8huQ9EbeMaP4Ws=/FRrjXqKRFP7sQFTf47gUmqbKYIxMFhqfLm0BeVZubiU=?refcode=6.30&amount=5) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qEyMxW4-d23udOpq_3TR4FK4hJP4S8huQ9EbeMaP4Ws=/FRrjXqKRFP7sQFTf47gUmqbKYIxMFhqfLm0BeVZubiU=?refcode=6.30&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qEyMxW4-d23udOpq_3TR4FK4hJP4S8huQ9EbeMaP4Ws=/FRrjXqKRFP7sQFTf47gUmqbKYIxMFhqfLm0BeVZubiU=?refcode=6.30&amount=25) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qEyMxW4-d23udOpq_3TR4FK4hJP4S8huQ9EbeMaP4Ws=/FRrjXqKRFP7sQFTf47gUmqbKYIxMFhqfLm0BeVZubiU=?refcode=6.30) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qEyMxW4-d23udOpq_3TR4FK4hJP4S8huQ9EbeMaP4Ws=/4I-CckN3f_7jBySisOMolZ3Dx4Ep8fwOgxNAr7BVNDs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qEyMxW4-d23udOpq_3TR4FK4hJP4S8huQ9EbeMaP4Ws=/7vyNRoZcmBf2EXkE8Qma3ZS11c9mV0eumDb7uhE1lDE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qEyMxW4-d23udOpq_3TR4FK4hJP4S8huQ9EbeMaP4Ws=/CBeF2w8-oyz8w63V__XB-Zs-xSTT6NMEWG-MlcdIWbQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qEyMxW4-d23udOpq_3TR4FK4hJP4S8huQ9EbeMaP4Ws=/uwfsQHAfZH2O9ZcuQ6em7ob0kA_drnuZ_VAx1kdjjr4=)

subject: OPEN
body:
Today you can help FIRE liberal Kendra Horn | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/83c2cbf365e0/calling-all-patriots-12548186?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=75846150a4&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Peter, [It's Election Day and the polls are now open!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6577ccb29a&e=795c6d9796)

If you haven't voted yet, please [find your polling location HERE](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4c8b68e744&e=795c6d9796) and be sure to vote. Also, please remind a friend friends -- as we know, every vote counts!

We've worked really hard for this day for months. Now we need to really make it count.

I decided to run for Congress because there's too much at stake for our children and grandkids. My precious grandchildren (they call me "Mimi") deserve a country that is safe and free.

We have to FIRE liberal Democrat Kendra Horn and stand with President Trump to finish the wall and put AMERICA FIRST.

Please stand with us. Please [vote today](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7c64a972f5&e=795c6d9796). Please take a minute to [remind a few friends](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6f79d8605b&e=795c6d9796). And please send up some prayers for our success, and for our country.

Thank you again for your support and friendship. God bless!

For Oklahoma,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7a383ee382&e=795c6d9796)
\--Janet Barresi

P.S. [Please show your support by putting this frame on your Facebook profile picture today!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=997af8996a&e=795c6d9796)

name: Corky Messner
subject: Our deadline is just hours away
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
We’re less than 24 hours away from an important deadline. We need your help in New Hampshire! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/21fe71563394c72a/9440d20c0eb8bdecc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, We are getting down to the wire here. We have less than 24 hours until our end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline. The amount we raise will set our budget for this summer, and determine how fiercely we can take down D.C. Jeanne Shaheen and win this race. **[Will you chip in $20 to help us WIN BIG in 2020?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/21fe71563394c72a/ca73557ebd2f7ca0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** We’re experiencing some trying times in America right now, and it’s never been more obvious that liberals only care about power, not people. **That’s why I’m running. I’m not a career politician. I’m a proud American, and I want to fight to preserve liberty and freedom in our great country**. I will stand with President Trump and his America First agenda, and fight hard against the progressives trying to turn us into a socialist nation. [**Please, rush your donation now. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Tell Republicans to STAND UP FOR AMERICA & other action items!
body:
| |
---
This week, there is a lot to do! We try to keep the call-to-action short and sweet, but sometimes there is too much going on and we have to try to act on as much as we can. Below is a short list of the action items, and then you can scroll down to the individual items for more details. **Note that in action items #1 and #3, you will be calling Congress. I recommend reading through all of the action items and then combining the messages when you call, so you only have to call once.**
1. Tell Republicans to STAND UP for America
2. Get ready for an Independence Day flag waving
3. Tell your Representative to vote NO on H.R. 2
4. Continue to share The Second Opinion Project

|
---
**Tell Republicans to STAND UP for America**
Last Thursday, House Freedom Caucus members held a press conference calling out the mobs, the lack of law and order, and called on AG Barr to take action. **This was great!**

Unfortunately, too many Republicans have been nearly silent on what is happening. As Tucker Carlson says in the article linked below, they may feel it’s going to blow over soon, but this is not something that is likely burn itself out. This is an organized effort to overthrow the United States founding, the Constitution, and our way of life, and more Republicans need to step up.

First, read and share this recent Tucker Carlson article/monologue, where he stated the following about the anarchist/communist movement to destroy America: [https://fxn.ws/3hPToBD](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTgyLWRlZWUzMmYwNmJmMzRkZTY5OGEzZWI1N2MyYWQ5ZmRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9meG4ud3MvM2hQVG9CRD9taWQ9NDIyNzcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=pW8ymIxO6E5WqQHdDQaflg)

Second, read and share the article below from Rep. Chip Roy of Texas. He, too, is calling on Republicans to loudly and proudly stand up to the lawlessness and obvious Marxist motives of rioters and those tearing down statues, and more. [https://thefederalist.com/2020/06/23/its-time-for-republicans-to-stand-up-for-america-already](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTgyLWRlZWUzMmYwNmJmMzRkZTY5OGEzZWI1N2MyYWQ5ZmRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVmZWRlcmFsaXN0LmNvbS8yMDIwLzA2LzIzL2l0cy10aW1lLWZvci1yZXB1YmxpY2Fucy10by1zdGFuZC11cC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS1hbHJlYWR5P21pZD00MjI3NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=tNCi5mtERItiZEm1_1edjw)

Third, read and share this article from American Mind, “Stand Up, Republicans.” [https://americanmind.org/post/stand-up-republicans](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTgyLWRlZWUzMmYwNmJmMzRkZTY5OGEzZWI1N2MyYWQ5ZmRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWVyaWNhbm1pbmQub3JnL3Bvc3Qvc3RhbmQtdXAtcmVwdWJsaWNhbnM_bWlkPTQyMjc3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=WjnFwCI5aX2x64qcJ90Flw)

Fourth, complete the following action items for this topic.
**For everyone:**
* Email the Chair of the Republican Party in your state the three articles linked above and tell them publicly stand up for law and order and for America. Just copy and paste the links above into an email.

**For those of you who have Republican Senators and/or Representative:**
* Call them and tell them it’s time to publicly stand up for law and order and for America. (Note: if your Senators or Representative are like Chip Roy, and are already standing up for America publicly, call and tell them thank you instead.)
* Email them the three articles linked above and tell them publicly stand up for law and order and for America. Just copy and paste the links above into an email or their website contact form.

**For those of you who have Democrat Senators and/or Representative:**
* Call them and tell them it is shameful that they and their party haven’t denounced the violence, and that their efforts to divide Americans based on race in order to win an election is disgusting.

|
---
**Get ready for an Independence Day flag waving**
Get ready for Independence Day! **Please use our[Independence Day Flag Waving Guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTgyLWRlZWUzMmYwNmJmMzRkZTY5OGEzZWI1N2MyYWQ5ZmRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0luZGVwZW5kYW5jZURheV9TaWduV2F2aW5nR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MjI3NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=ohTE3VSK_vbLm07D9mk63Q) to help you organize your flag waving event**. Our suggested theme is "The Promise of America." The left is trying to delegitimize our entire founding and nation, and it's likely they will use Independence Day to do so. We must publicly push back on these narratives. We have sign suggestions based on the theme, and we will have sample social media posts to use and share soon, so look for those this week as well.
|
---
**Tell your Representative to vote NO on H.R. 2**
From Rep. Steve Scalie’s office: “This week [the House will consider H.R. 2](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTgyLWRlZWUzMmYwNmJmMzRkZTY5OGEzZWI1N2MyYWQ5ZmRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ydWxlcy5ob3VzZS5nb3YvYmlsbC8xMTYvaHItMj9taWQ9NDIyNzcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=S0-4NRg5c_OPnHj_i2YDFw) — INVEST in America Act, or better known as Speaker Pelosi’s “My Way or the Highway” bill. This legislation is a $1.5 Trillion dollar liberal wish list combined with elements of the Green New Deal. This is another unserious effort by the majority and it won’t go anywhere after the DEMS ram in through the House.”

**Call your Representative, whether Republican or Democrat, and tell him or her to vote NO on H.R. 2.** We know the Democrats will pass it, but we need to make sure they understand the American people oppose it anyway. They have to feel some pressure so that they don’t think we approve of what they are doing.
|
---
**Continue to share The Second Opinion Project**
Please keep sharing the website, the videos, petitions, and letters, which can all be found at: [https://www.secondopinionproject.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTgyLWRlZWUzMmYwNmJmMzRkZTY5OGEzZWI1N2MyYWQ5ZmRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tP21pZD00MjI3NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=hqdYRVWfx4f7n5s8irgtBQ)
|
---
_**Note about sharing links:** We’ve heard from some of you that you are not on any social media and so you can’t share videos and petitions and other items. I just wanted to assure you that if you share links over email to your friends and family, it is just as effective and important as sharing on social media. We are going to make it easier for those of you who are only sharing over email to copy and paste the link into an email. Sometimes we will specifically need a social media post to be shared, and for those action items, if you do not do social media, you can simply copy and paste the link for those posts into an email. At the end of the day, we are just so thankful for whatever actions you are able to take. Thank you!_
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
|
---
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTgyLWRlZWUzMmYwNmJmMzRkZTY5OGEzZWI1N2MyYWQ5ZmRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00MjI3NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=c3JAGTLqoUPKcsuM9ne9WA)

subject: special interests are spending BIG in Texas

body:
We can beat them with grassroots power!

|

---
Peter --

Our final end-of-quarter deadline before the runoff is at midnight tonight! Experts everywhere will use the next FEC reports to judge our chances of defeating Sen. Cornyn in November, so we have to prove that we have the resources to fight back against his special interest money.

**Cornyn has raised:**
* **$10,542,294 from corporate PACs**
* **$1,852,308 from the insurance industry**
* **$1,372,662 from the pharmaceutical industry**

And that's only a partial list. The Koch network is dumping in huge sums of money to try to prop up Sen. Cornyn too, because they know he'll always put special interests ahead of Texans.
**[MAKE A MATCHED DONATION
NOW TO FIGHT BACK! ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890163/7f51f7bc/4166b08a/4ef623cc/3009288324/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200630.1nd__1633__&amount=10")**
The good news is we can beat their big money with the help of this grassroots team. More than 42,000 donors have chipped in an average online donation of just $23 at a time to help power MJ's campaign, and we need to keep building as we head into the runoff and the general election.

**All donations before tonight 's midnight deadline are being MATCHED, so pitch in now to double your impact and help us reach our 2,000 new donor goal! We'll even mail you a Team MJ sticker as thanks.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Pat Hackett for Congress**

| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9941d360f7&e=5886ca081d)

| Dear Friend,

Today, I am pleased to announce the endorsement of former Presidential candidate, South Bend’s own Mayor Pete Buttigieg!

Pete’s historic campaign rooted in optimism, courage, and hope reminds us of the higher values to which we are called as Americans. I am grateful to Pete for his support and endorsement. It will be my honor to serve as his representative in the US House.

Pete was kind enough to record the special message above. Please take a moment to watch.

We have an important fundraising deadline tonight at 11:59pm EDT ending the second fundraising quarter. Many eyes are on our campaign’s increasing momentum. As Pete says, I cannot do it alone!

[**Will you join Mayor Pete in supporting our campaign with an investment in Dignity and Justice for All?**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=0778c3c27c&e=5886ca081d)

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Defending our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
In the last two weeks, we have seen the Supreme Court rule in favor of nondiscrimination protections for LGBTQ workers, the preservation of DACA, and a woman's right to choose in Louisiana.
Like many of you, I'm happily surprised by the Supreme Court's decisions. That said, I refuse to take these rulings for granted. That's because the Trump Administration has no bottom when it comes to its destructive, small-minded agenda. We have fought too long and too hard for progress to let it be reversed now.
As long as I'm a Congresswoman, I will stand up to President Trump's weak and ignorant policies and fight for the working people of CA-38 by protecting the Affordable Care Act, working for a more humane immigration system, and fighting for criminal justice reform.
[**If you 're ready to see me in Congress for two more years, please consider making a donation to my re-election campaign >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/ajVNG0HqZfbdB8WUsZb8an1g0QCCJNpZwP-pzTe8m1g=/fqVrlR6227FJvu6g7xZFKkUWji-C5KMiMcVgCDWORpo=?refcode=X_063020_EOQ_H)

clean_body: In the last two weeks, we have seen the Supreme Court rule in favor of nondiscrimination protections for LGBTQ workers, the preservation of DACA, and a woman's right to choose in Louisiana. Like many of you, I'm happily surprised by the Supreme Court's decisions. That said, I refuse to take these rulings for granted. That's because the Trump Administration has no bottom when it comes to its destructive, small-minded agenda. We have fought too long and too hard for progress to let it be reversed now. As long as I'm a Congresswoman, I will stand up to President Trump's weak and ignorant policies and fight for the working people of CA-38 by protecting the Affordable Care Act, working for a more humane immigration system, and fighting for criminal justice reform. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you so much, \--Linda S anchez = = Paid for by Stand with Sánchez Stand with Sánchez 415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1 Washington DC 20003 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

Friend \--

There’s no doubt we’re facing many challenges.

The administration’s reckless handling of COVID-19. Institutional racism. An unemployment crisis. And a climate emergency threatening all life on our planet.

Despite how bad things look, I remain encouraged and hopeful about the future of our country. **And I owe that to you.**

We’ve faced difficulties here in San Diego, but I’m proud to have had your ongoing support for taking bold, progressive action on issues like climate change, immigration, and housing. It’s clear that our community is ready to lead in the fight for economic, racial, environmental, and social justice in Washington.

It gives me hope knowing that we have an opportunity to continue our work in Congress, and I look forward to what we can accomplish together.

**[This is the FINAL DAY to make a donation to my campaign before our end-of-quarter deadline. I need your help because we’re still short of our goal. Will you chip in $10, or whatever amount you can afford, to help us hit our mark?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18085752/216277764/1147193815?refcode=em-200630-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGFjYjU3NC1mN2JhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Axgg8oKsg5ZvN0NkrZ183nWQt2kc5ErpZNvVN6tpWaw=)**

Proud of the movement we’re building,

_Georgette_

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Senator Jill Vogel- Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Senator Jill H. Vogel Update July 2020

I wish you and your family a happy and healthy 4th of July!
As you know, these are difficult political and economic times in Virginia and we face serious legislative challenges as we begin the month of July. The Senate Finance Committee met last week to consider updated budget forecasts and to plan for necessary changes to the 2-year budget just adopted in March. Revising the budget will be necessary given the ongoing impact of the economic shutdown resulting from COVID-19.
Meanwhile, we are working to prepare for a Special Session of the House and Senate which is set to convene at the Capitol in August. The focus of this special session has already expanded from public health, COVID, and the budget, to include a proposed comprehensive overhaul of policing and criminal justice in the wake of protests following the killing of George Floyd in Minneapolis. There is growing anger and anxiety from Virginians who have demanded that we return to Richmond and fix what has deteriorated so rapidly since March. I hear from people across Virginia every day who are angry about the current political environment, distraught over the economic shutdown, and distressed at the destruction in so many communities.
July 1, begins Phase 3 of reopening Virginia. This expands the number permitted in social gatherings to 250; gyms, fitness centers, and pools may operate at 75% capacity; entertainment venues may re-open; and restaurants may expand capacity.
In addition, hundreds of new laws enacted during the 2020 session take effect this week and will have a sweeping impact on all Virginians. Tension from new House and Senate majorities made the 2020 session more controversial and brought some of the biggest change Virginia has witnessed in decades. Legislation that becomes law July 1, 2020 includes:
[HB 4/SB 36](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszj4lh0jHhAi3nVJAfMnHfrSf_M0Fr8xgyVvd2-Pcv74vvJtydIoEE-MnwjTWNgPMbiPN6KrtnL6zRnj2LvWLwIwUBMcosct82-_m9fnBpztv3TH0fUmv5kA2J9LX49-n5vjGexORqL_VHnLh7ECxtPLyLqDLSflBny&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Authorizes casino gaming in Virginia.
[HB 896/SB 384 ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszjhWyHqVhPF2G95WC3gZmsGKSt1YofoVH499YvOLw3ZmDt8SNTBq6xIxF_CddMWifS-8MMJqcHNgjIUGfoyGbSOyIqrkU820uja0-CVwu_D91aXcJXPOQDQwtVlHbjvNAk_AITNKJF_etOaOOTGGBLF1vbpVg6JKOu&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==)Directs the Virginia Lottery to regulate sports betting.
[HB1414/SB890](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszjNKv09ToGBZWhOCcrKW13F7NiG6PSEgW3HS4oZnaKMacYVBVIJtYecWQoLnTv_YC4mW_JyRP0EZBGYT6667MjAWe011vIKKb_3x49B8W1_WrvJZcEz0vKqXauTg9i2aLw68uC7-wTFOqOdEe9WUKVX_jc6ofRDYit&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Increases the gas tax by converting the tax from a percentage of the wholesale price of gas and diesel fuel to a cents-per-gallon tax. The tax increases 12 cents per gallon phased in, then indexes annually to increase based on the consumer price index.
[HB 1537/SB 183](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszjAiqrHr-FYDqV4jZl8bZ6wFALUOlaTSZ34fWjhGmIC8HvNgEuPt0Kzzie7yLfq-BdnHwrvOAqTe2WU9pLiNhDZgzSIy7oordNrMGqin9ADisdaoRUQMKu4w5dlstEHrcaz9mHNwL5swfvi5O3emsl9-7rOIXajiqd&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Permits localities to remove or relocate monuments and war memorials.
[HB 421/SB 35 ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszjB-FLG_B-8XThThtf8rMAL-rFkBMAklUOr5BfJMmsHBltKAFLpwFxTQUEfCd573mjs1kSB8DLFRQ0q_d0R6xRiQ2o7Uwa9r73stiJx75_M2DxeTA6-KSK4N1h7lwRMCgtqhtNszr3erazDEPqihsCZDQppamNazTy&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==)Allows localities to ban firearms.
[HB 395/ SB 7](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszjeFVE_IGbyLZVOgkcyJU9THphIXDQjhN55Sa9rupfbBEo5aQJFHVtTMNJFcupLTiAU3M_eSW4RR3A-Os2fzwRsXGnQKkZCrjHCO7hvnhH3TlAcZ2ifhpkt7iGnz40OwMJAnuxCoj0x5IcfvDXoz82_Z0wtjBemv_q&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Increases minimum wage incrementally to $15 between now and 2026 and then creates annual adjustments tied to the consumer price index. ($7.25 per hour to $9.50 per hour effective May 1, 2021; $11.00 per hour effective January 1, 2022; $12.00 per hour effective January 1, 2023; to $13.50 per hour effective January 1, 2025; and $15.00 per hour effective January 1, 2026.)
[HB 874/ SB 160](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszj4dU7zbUJAGOm0qcZyDUMNAip4Z5EimaChU1mIE6x2NqyPQjpfxwHxdZc1RBNAnIhlFZyCsR6rN0LVp94GH7QNGQnylBleti4DhcIQcxgW-jRHLJPfOXoNbol3ASaOhLLp3EV4IQR3FVc3hNE8zqLM5lK8QUpeXkL&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Bans the use of a handheld cell phone while driving a motor vehicle (effective Jan. 1, 2021).
[HB 1/ SB 111](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszjZzIyMxjjNf7EajHuocER7javD2RtXofqqXzmDnqtjuoXMZJIKvI0fGt61A1NzdMUjl6e_Mh1_My70-OtMpql_Wlnet4uErduEa173g_I_9XsoQsmgSyggN_EmEjR39ZBBD1JWg2vgwDhwMBwY9qnH1ccsuCuwbhy&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Permits no excuse absentee voting.
[HB 1547/SB 935](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszj8TuIAyZ0osNbvrHRRKY1_PSvM9lMDWPHJuE1q3hxJFPvYyd_WXONWTKMyZOQitnCoYyKJeHjzSmWHJOOzYwOYBPlbfb2tMsIlI3Uqg6je7cOaKtrbU6r9VVvIJn_bEUHbOzhrcYt7zPpb4w_79ONqs6Zt8ZfFS0s&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Authorizes in-state tuition at Virginia public colleges and universities regardless of citizenship or immigration status.
[HB 19/ SB 65](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszjTwFPSgUFhmOxTeZzkxmbzFItAM_7uD1Z-FS1P7bWMeydG7bAxR21Lqq-pyjnaKScM-I_Aj9IvsuNlE0LNbEWzRYs4Gc5VMfVAH7ytzBt3o2xYTFx23H_G_YDzCsfh1CGpCWEmqI4MFEF0c0Kv2V-OSk-pfEibk8j&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Removes the requirement that a voter present a valid photo ID in order to vote.
[HB 909/SB 513](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszjRAxFIHudtqaemH2AUAVqCcb81lORY45f85U1GltzkvKQOnCag5D3loVlvhhT-JS9vgEhxXDvjVp35zNZBBapqYMLIj0ze4nuETmC3nOtBi6PyFdGBCfrdXL_IT9m3AKaBkdhXyfCviFXOmYNuhJOiOuJmpK1Ws93&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Removes existing provisions that allow a person's driver's license to be suspended (i) for drug offenses, (ii) non-payment of certain fees and (iii) for shoplifting motor fuel.
[SB 868](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszjSTxBR477sWnqZkg3COtZLgog9TyYtaO3I7HNPJTTEkBYcYsPcz26rEbdonviz5ECoyRftX6W9emflKEg-IB-gfeRZxUxEJy30glE5qoqmtIo--vbZ4oKj5EU62Y_VwIDvxiVSmix8JsG_mL6k7sFaeUk6_KjQts1&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Prohibits discrimination in public accommodations, employment, credit, and housing on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity. The bill codifies for state and local government employment the current prohibitions on discrimination in employment on the basis of race, color, religion, national origin, sex, pregnancy, childbirth or related medical conditions, age, marital status, disability, or status as a veteran.
[HB 972/SB 2](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QC7YOAMQg64Ys72i1aZAb2AaIVLntf1Gp4tbtB-07gq985lBWl651qRv__HTyszjPX7bIEbUVaad-90vgkxhCySVHJdMwAiYJJ21pJXdtzXbr8ms01OCqgnvUo7DtNKV0w4_kV4nbdzsF5MDg9OJ_ts0ABx_ZL0_TB2VaVB1EuLvehXz2RU9z1VExDJwbRba1HA6bLkqOLLsLzATQDMwOe0n398d2taZHbW2k11W6o6ZH-so-k5xbQo3PwN8K8J_hpEuBfywkUz8XzV6sHsdSIb6yBQFLQokMnAC633fJWkO0nmeRbIUlFmenFeS7dlH3s_Ky7InP_8LfMnoIlAhohtLsHbAF6fhHpUxQdMGZo56X6p8Ygic1AstFUJ78f2r-W3ofy9EbYJtCVcq6Nn3iJz7ZWKHwM03sx5KUDjx4CZWH4x3H4McsUBpEBQktFOCPFwCu0lUe4A=&c=VXvLOfq0N1mPwBTvO3dsELwiAXnEAeTLJ8craWApCqpsnfEkmtf_9Q==&ch=HF0SS6VeMgPO-lUQH1gLGZqi3zNNwy05NaF0g2BnnxzFOhfTBwimAg==) Decriminalizes simple marijuana possession and provides a civil penalty of no more than $25.
Our office will continue to keep you updated as the legislature meets this summer.
As always, please stay in touch and have a wonderful 4th of July holiday.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Senator Jill H. Vogel Update July 2020 I wish you and your family a happy and healthy 4th of July! As you know, these are difficult political and economic times in Virginia and we face serious legislative challenges as we begin the month of July. The Senate Finance Committee met last week to consider updated budget forecasts and to plan for necessary changes to the 2-year budget just adopted in March. Revising the budget will be necessary given the ongoing impact of the economic shutdown resulting from COVID-19. Meanwhile, we are working to prepare for a Special Session of the House and Senate which is set to convene at the Capitol in August. The focus of this special session has already expanded from public health, COVID, and the budget, to include a proposed comprehensive overhaul of policing and criminal justice in the wake of protests following the killing of George Floyd in Minneapolis. There is growing anger and anxiety from Virginians who have demanded that we return to Richmond and fix what has deteriorated so rapidly since March. I hear from people across Virginia every day who are angry about the current political environment, distraught over the economic shutdown, and distressed at the destruction in so many communities. July 1, begins Phase 3 of reopening Virginia. This expands the number permitted in social gatherings to 250; gyms, fitness centers, and pools may operate at 75% capacity; entertainment venues may re-open; and restaurants may expand capacity. In addition, hundreds of new laws enacted during the 2020 session take effect this week and will have a sweeping impact on all Virginians. Tension from new House and Senate majorities made the 2020 session more controversial and brought some of the biggest change Virginia has witnessed in decades. Legislation that becomes law July 1, 2020 includes: == Authorizes casino gaming in Virginia. the Virginia Lottery to regulate sports betting. == Increases the gas tax by converting the tax from a percentage of the wholesale price of gas and diesel fuel to a cents-per-gallon tax. The tax increases 12 cents per gallon phased in, then indexes annually to increase based on the consumer price index. == Permits localities to remove or relocate monuments and war memorials. localities to ban firearms. == Increases minimum wage incrementally to $15 between now and 2026 and then creates annual adjustments tied to the consumer price index. ($7.25 per hour to $9.50 per hour effective May 1, 2021; $11.00 per hour effective January 1, 2022; $12.00 per hour effective January 1, 2023; to $13.50 per hour effective January 1, 2025; and $15.00 per hour effective January 1, 2026.) == Bans the use of a handheld cell phone while driving a motor vehicle (effective Jan. 1, 2021). == Permits no excuse absentee voting. == Authorizes in-state tuition at Virginia public colleges and universities regardless of citizenship or immigration status. == Removes the requirement that a voter present a valid photo ID in order to vote. == Removes existing provisions that allow a person's driver's license to be suspended (i) for drug offenses, (ii) non-payment of certain fees and (iii) for shoplifting motor fuel. == Prohibits discrimination in public accommodations, employment, credit, and housing on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity. The bill codifies for state and local government employment the current prohibitions on discrimination in employment on the basis of race, color, religion, national origin, sex, pregnancy, childbirth or related medical conditions, age, marital status, disability, or status as a veteran. == Decriminalizes simple marijuana possession and provides a civil penalty of no more than $25. Our office will continue to keep you updated as the legislature meets this summer. As always, please stay in touch and have a wonderful 4th of July holiday. | Sincerely, | | | ---|--- | Senator Jill Vogel | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram Updates == == == | | Vogel for Senate | 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@senatorjillvogel.com in collaboration with |

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz Considering Mask Wearing Mandate
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=retarget_2_weeks_away&n=1)
---
Peter -- This is unbelievable... **According to[Tom Hauser of KSTP](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tq_OR9x2rutaG3YoH0znIn418Ec8ecozD0yTx2RKOVklASF4E1ASSRiMCLEMVjkp2A&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=retarget_2_weeks_away&n=2), Governor Walz is "considering a statewide mask mandate, but would prefer the 'carrot' rather than the 'stick' to encourage people to wear them."** We're about to enter the month of July. An important month in our country's history. July is when we celebrate our independence from tyranny and the start of our experiment in freedom. **Unfortunately, we're entering the fifth month in a row that the tyrant-in-making Tim Walz is extending his "emergency" powers. Despite a decline in cases in Minnesota and no serious death count, our Governor plans to continue his illegal grasp of power that is clearly harming our economy and infringing on our civil liberties.** If you pay attention to the scare tactics of the media, the U.S. is awaiting a second wave of COVID, this time even worse than the first. Meanwhile, there's a dust cloud from Africa and murder hornets migrating to our country. You get the picture! Liberty is too precious to let its fate be in the hands of one man. That's the exact reason our Founding Fathers gave us a Republic...if we can keep it! Action 4 Liberty's mission is to preserve liberty for the next generation, which is why we were the first group in Minnesota to come out publicly against Tim Walz' usurpation of powers. If you've been following our work, you know we've forced three separate votes on the End Walz' Powers Resolution in the House, each one gaining momentum. We started in April with only 15 Republicans supporting the bill. Now we have all Republicans and two Democrats in the House. We also forced Sen Paul Gazelka and the Minnesota Senate to vote on and pass the End Walz' Resolution in their chamber. Three Democrats went against their Party's governor and voted with us. Because these corrupt Democrats in the Minnesota House won't uphold their oath to the Constitution by Ending Walz' Emergency Powers, we've plowed ahead by passing "Liberate our City" Resolutions. So far, cities like Ham Lake and Hanover have passed them, protecting their citizens from Walz' retribution. **More importantly, we partnered up with a group of patriots who started the petition to Recall Walz. This movement has gained tens of thousands of signatures in just over a month's time**. So as you can tell, we are fighting around the clock to STOP TIM WALZ! But we **[need your help](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=retarget_2_weeks_away&n=3)** to continue on in this battle. Failure is NOT an option here. Liberty is one generation from vanishing! Help Action 4 Liberty build the army and equip our team in this fight to End Walz' Emergency Powers with a donation today. | [](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=vJzsGDqiixqCUhiH9Q9jjW-g8L1r1gqesJgaBRvjtXgPJJDVyX-sR-Ug4-tENiIZ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=retarget_2_weeks_away&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=vJzsGDqiixqCUhiH9Q9jjW-g8L1r1gqesJgaBRvjtXgPJJDVyX-sR-Ug4-tENiIZ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=retarget_2_weeks_away&n=5)
---
Minnesota is at a pivotal point in its history. We have rioting in the streets, high unemployment, and politicians like Tim Walz giving illegal orders. You and I know we have to **fight back now** to save our state from disaster.
We aren't ready to give up this great state with its rich history, beautiful north woods, and 10,000 lakes full of fishing, boating and everything under the sun. That's why it's more important than ever that we all put everything we have into this fight to STOP these illegal shutdown orders.
[**If you are want to continue fighting to preserve liberty in Minnesota, please donate $250, $100, $50, or even $25 today. Join us in eradicating the liberal cancer and usher in the next generation of freedom!**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=retarget_2_weeks_away&n=6)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S. WALZ, THE TYRANT-IN-MAKING, IS ABOUT TO EXTEND HIS ILLEGAL EMERGENCY POWERS FOR THE FIFTH MONTH IN A ROW. MANY OF YOU ARE HAVING THE DISCUSSION ABOUT FLEEING MINNESOTA FOR OTHER STATES, BUT ACTION 4 LIBERTY ISN'T READY TO GIVE UP YET. OUR MISSION IS TO PRESERVE LIBERTY FOR THE NEXT GENERATION.**
**THAT'S WHY WE'VE FOUGHT GOVERNOR WALZ FROM THE BEGINNING OF HIS ILLEGAL USE OF EMERGENCY POWERS. WHETHER IT'S AT THE CAPITOL, IN YOUR CITY OR A STATEWIDE RECALL EFFORT, WE ARE BUILDING THE ARMY TO STOP TIM WALZ.[HELP EQUIP OUR TEAM WITH A DONATION OF $250, $100, $50, OR EVEN $25 TODAY](http://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=retarget_2_weeks_away&n=7).**
Action 4 Liberty · United States

If you've been following our work, you know we've forced three separate votes on the End Walz' Powers Resolution in the House, each one gaining momentum. We started in April with only 15 Republicans supporting the bill. Now we have all Republicans and two Democrats in the House. We also forced Sen Paul Gazelka and the Minnesota Senate to vote on and pass the End Walz' Resolution in their chamber. Three Democrats went against their Party's governor and voted with us. Because these corrupt Democrats in the Minnesota House won't uphold their oath to the Constitution by Ending Walz' Emergency Powers, we've plowed ahead by passing "Liberate our City" Resolutions. So far, cities like Ham Lake and Hanover have passed them, protecting their citizens from Walz' retribution. More importantly, we partnered up with a group of patriots who started the petition to Recall Walz. This movement has gained tens of thousands of signatures in just over a month's time. So as you can tell, we are fighting around the clock to STOP TIM WALZ! But we to continue on in this battle. Failure is NOT an option here. Liberty is one generation from vanishing! Help Action 4 Liberty build the army and equip our team in this fight to End Walz' Emergency Powers with a donation today. | "DONATE" Minnesota is at a pivotal point in its history. We have rioting in the streets, high unemployment, and politicians like Tim Walz giving illegal orders. You and I know we have to fight back now to save our state from disaster. We aren't ready to give up this great state with its rich history, beautiful north woods, and 10,000 lakes full of fishing, boating and everything under the sun. That's why it's more important than ever that we all put everything we have into this fight to STOP these illegal shutdown orders. In Liberty, ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty P.S. WALZ, THE TYRANT-IN-MAKING, IS ABOUT TO EXTEND HIS ILLEGAL EMERGENCY POWERS FOR THE FIFTH MONTH IN A ROW. MANY OF YOU ARE HAVING THE DISCUSSION ABOUT FLEEING MINNESOTA FOR OTHER STATES, BUT ACTION 4 LIBERTY ISN'T READY TO GIVE UP YET. OUR MISSION IS TO PRESERVE LIBERTY FOR THE NEXT GENERATION. THAT'S WHY WE'VE FOUGHT GOVERNOR WALZ FROM THE BEGINNING OF HIS ILLEGAL USE OF EMERGENCY POWERS. WHETHER IT'S AT THE CAPITOL, IN YOUR CITY OR A STATEWIDE RECALL EFFORT, WE ARE BUILDING THE ARMY TO STOP TIM WALZ..** Action 4 Liberty · United States
