name: Team Kathy
subject: stark difference:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
2 very different visions for North Carolina ->
|
---

| | It's clear -- the differences couldn't be more stark. President Trump said:
* He wants to "terminate health care under Obamacare"
* The USPS is "a joke" when postal carriers are working on the frontlines of this health crisis
* Outrageous lies in an effort to block vote-by-mail efforts

Kathy believes we should:
* Protect health care and make it more affordable
* Provide emergency aid to rescue the USPS
* Safeguard voting rights for all North Carolinians

The Trump Administration's failures are an important reminder that our mission to flip this critical red seat and turn it blue for the first time in three decades is more important than ever. [_**If you can, chip in before the FEC end-of-quarter deadline tonight.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2c4/3d199a51/2f580175/7364d1fd/3492187811/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDYzMGFtIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im5kIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200630am?refcode=kme200630am_nd_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2c4/3d199a51/2f580175/7364d1fd/3492187811/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDYzMGFtIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im5kIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200630am?refcode=kme200630am_nd_other&refcode2=17426")

Hoosier Republican,

Today is the final day before the end-of-quarter reporting deadline at midnight. We’ve been telling you about our 5th District candidate, Victoria Spartz – and I really want to do what we can for her so Republicans can win BIG!

It’s a battleground race, and it could determine control of the House. That’s why the Democrats are already pouring buckets of out-of-state money into the district to try and win it.

Can you chip in what you can now to give Victoria a boost?

Donate $5 NOW!>> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq4-062620?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=We_need_to_win_this_battleground_race&amount=5&mc_cid=b7d0939c76&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Friend,

Why haven't you contributed to our critical End-of-Quarter Goal yet?

Supporter:
http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c8dbf5479df5c4b13bdbf770cc92008dde127da09327d97e0536d60c8aa1ab134042d0982576d0803f62b897966f81075a6dceaea6bbf8c1
dpwillis67@gmail.com
End-of-Quarter Donation: MISSING

I wouldn’t be reaching out if this wasn’t our most important goal to date.

name: Barbara Bollier
subject: Why I left the Republican party:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7193/4bd7760e/5eb93126/77a9e52f/351070330/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/less-email/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&source=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&refcode=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro") for only the most important emails, or you can click [here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7193/4bd7760e/5eb93126/77a9e52e/351070330/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1ZWI5MzEyNiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI3MTkzIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://act.314actionfund.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/5eb93126/29bb7193?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&source=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&refcode=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro") to unsubscribe.
| Friends,

My name is Barbara Bollier, and I'm running for U.S. Senate in Kansas. I'm a physician, a wife, a mother, and a public servant. I'd like to take a few minutes to introduce myself and share a bit more about why I'm going to win this race. [But before I do, I'm going to ask you to donate $5, $25, whatever you can spare, to help me reach tonight's critical FEC fundraising goal.](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7193/4bd7760e/5eb93126/77a9e52d/351070330/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_bollier_split_2020?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+But+before+I+do+Irsquom+going+to+ask+you&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&source=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&refcode=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro")

Let me start by saying: I used to be a Republican.

I've been in Kansas politics since 2010, serving first in the Kansas House of Representatives, then in the State Senate. **As a doctor, I 've always looked at what the facts tell me, and tried to find common sense solutions to our problems. I earned a reputation as a leader who could work with folks on both sides of the aisle to deliver results.**

But I found that the Kansas Republican party was losing its way. In the State Senate, I was alienated for my support of reproductive rights, Medicaid expansion, and funding for K-12 schools. **I was tired of the Kansas GOP 's hard-line rhetoric, its contempt for compromise, and its obsession with putting political power before children and families.**

When the Kansas GOP adopted anti-trans language as part of its party platform in 2018, I'd had enough. I could no longer be complicit as the Republican party became the party of extremism. I left the GOP, and I haven't looked back.

Republicans have held both Senate seats in my state since the Great Depression -- but this year, we can change that. The latest polls have me leading my likely Republican opponent, Kris Kobach, by one point. And with the support of groups like EMILY's List, End Citizens United, and 314 Action Fund, we'll have the resources to flip this seat -- and with it, flip the Senate.

[My campaign has our biggest fundraising deadline yet on June 30, and my team tells me we're coming up short on our goal. Can I count on you to contribute $5, $25, $50, or whatever you can afford to help me WIN this race and flip the Senate?](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7193/4bd7760e/5eb93126/77a9e52c/351070330/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_bollier_split_2020?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+My+campaign+has+our+biggest+fundraising+&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&source=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&refcode=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro")

I'm deeply grateful for your support,

Barbara

[](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7193/4bd7760e/5eb93126/77a9e52b/351070330/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_bollier_split_2020?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&source=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&refcode=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro")

---
Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7193/4bd7760e/5eb93126/77a9e52a/351070330/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1ZWI5MzEyNiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI3MTkzIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://act.314actionfund.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/5eb93126/29bb7193?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&source=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&refcode=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7193/4bd7760e/5eb93126/77a9e529/351070330/VEsB/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro&source=314_EM_FR_200630_3MO-3MC-1MNTL_none_STD_1_bollierintro")** to make a donation.

They’ve already shown they are more interested in attacking Democrats than taking on McCaul. Who knows what attacks they are going to peddle on our airwaves here in Texas. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = In 2018, as our nominee Mike crushed the previous vote totals and gave McCaul a real scare. Now, this out-of-state, out-of-touch dark-money group is saying Mike can’t win. Well, they’re wrong. = Fighting with you, Team Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: If Democrats Want Criminal Justice Reform, They Should Work with Republicans
body:
A year and a half ago, President Trump signed historic prison reform into law. Now, once again, he is looking to work across the aisle | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7676d602c9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **If Democrats Want Criminal Justice Reform, They Should Work with Republicans**

A year and a half ago, President Trump signed historic prison reform into law. Now, once again, he is looking to work across the aisle in bipartisan fashion to “increase public safety for all communities, particularly Black Americans,” White House advisor Ja’Ron Smith writes in _The Hill_.

“But congressional Democrats are, sadly, playing politics with police reform.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d87f07555&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| During the first 3 weeks of June, 75 people were shot in Atlanta. Eleven have died. “These are not police shootings. They’re civilians shooting civilians. They don’t carry the outrage and notoriety that a cop shooting someone will. But the victims are just as dead,” Bill Torpy writes in [_The Atlanta Journal Constitution_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd6756d90b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump’s recent action to suspend certain foreign guest worker visas will not hurt the U.S. economy, Matthew Tragesser writes. “The influx of foreign labor, largely via the suspended visa programs, has stagnated and depressed wages for Americans for decades.” Read more in [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=86cd97792e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Since April, the U.S. Small Business Administration has approved more than 4.7 _million_ loans totaling over half a trillion dollars. “SBA worked with 5,500 lenders of all sizes, including 4,000 community banks, 1,000 credit unions, 302 Community Development Financial Institutions (CDFIs), 170 Minority Depository Institutions, [and] 54 farm credit institutions,” SBA Administrator Jovita Carranza writes __ in the [_Orlando Sentinel_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3037d9a4e5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5194ea79e5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d4acd315e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=42f19b3342)

We missed our fundraising target during the weekend. Thanks to grassroots donors, we made up some ground yesterday, but we still need a big response today to make sure we hit Elizabeth's goal before the midnight FEC deadline.

You haven't made a contribution to Warren Democrats yet -- and if you've been waiting for the perfect time to own a piece of this grassroots movement, this is it:

**[If you're able to make a contribution today, could you chip in $2 or anything you can right now to help hit our goal before tonight's FEC deadline and elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250bb/45c30650/1cfd6172e/66e9a645/420111993/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzM0Rl9FT1FfR1JNX0RfMjAyMDA2MzBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS34F_EOQ_GRM_D_20200630_V1S1_P")**

This is our first full FEC report since Elizabeth launched Warren Democrats. This quarter has been strong so far, and we have a chance to file an FEC report that shows grassroots donors are excited about re-electing Elizabeth and electing progressive Democrats up and down the ballot.

But we have to pick up the pace today to hit our target and make up for the weekend.

**$2 or anything you can contribute today will make a huge impact -- and your donation will be invested to help elect progressive Democrats like Elizabeth up and down the ballot.

[If you're able to, please make your first donation today to help close the gap on our FEC report and power our organizing efforts to help elect Warren Democrats.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250bb/45c30650/1cfd6172e/66e9a645/420111993/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzM0Rl9FT1FfR1JNX0RfMjAyMDA2MzBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS34F_EOQ_GRM_D_20200630_V1S1_P")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

| | **Friends,** **As we head into July 4th weekend, I have something very important that I need you to know.** **At a time when Conservatism is winning and we are facing the most important election of our lifetime, the Democrats are out raising us across the board!** **_Montana is a red state but the Democrats are organized, prepared, and willing to do what it takes to win. _

We cannot allow the Democrats to take the Senate, House, White House, and our seats on the Land Board. We cannot win in 2020 without you. ** **Our monthly deadline is midnight tonight. Please Donate Now.**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, Our end-of-month deadline is at midnight tonight -- and I have an update for you on our goal: **[We're less than $8,000 away from our $50,000 goal. This is the last call: Will you make a donation of $5 or more right now to close the gap before our midnight end-of-month deadline?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9344?t=5&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9345?t=6&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9346?t=7&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9347?t=8&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9348?t=9&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9349?t=10&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9344?t=11&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59)
---
Until mid-June, I hadn't campaigned or fundraised since December. After the legislative fundraising freeze ended, the COVID-19 outbreak began and I have dedicated my energy and focus to combatting the virus.
I've been fighting tooth and nail for Washingtonians, just like I always have -- and attacks from Donald Trump and his GOP allies have only kept me laser focused on what counts: the families here in Washington state, how to keep them safe and healthy, and how we move our economy forward.
I won't let anyone or anything distract me from that work. But we still have an election this fall -- and I'm one of just four Democratic governorships that the Republican Governors Association has their eye on flipping. They've spent millions of dollars here in Washington state to try to unseat me before, and this year will be no different.
**We've beat back their attacks before, and we can do it again now.[That starts with hitting our $50,000 goal, and we're just $7,894 away: Will you donate $5 or more right now, before tonight's midnight deadline?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9344?t=12&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9344?t=13&akid=8087%2E868730%2EA6cZ59)
---

name: Liz Olson
subject: The path ahead
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wJY2Hh-z_3Ezlv4rijENsblR2UjRWpDqE0P2jpa-AXg=/Ee-nADPY3hvX0gGnC_fReKcOdZL4iDztu6HhumDHVUI=?refcode=063020PM)
| | Friend, Our campaign to protect and expand the House DFL Majority is underway. I believe wholeheartedly in the goodness of our state. I also believe it's time for our state legislature to truly reflect the values of Minnesotans. In order to do that, we need to protect the DFL Majority in the Minnesota House and elect a majority in the Minnesota Senate that is responsive to the needs of Minnesotans in every corner of the state. [**Make a Contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wJY2Hh-z_3Ezlv4rijENsblR2UjRWpDqE0P2jpa-AXg=/Ee-nADPY3hvX0gGnC_fReKcOdZL4iDztu6HhumDHVUI=?refcode=063020PM) Now is the time for us to come together, rally around our shared values, and chart a new path that builds a better future for all Minnesotans. Please consider making an investment in our campaign today. We have a big reporting deadline this month and your contribution would go a long way to showing our collective power on the path ahead. Thank you, Rep. Liz Olson (07B - Duluth) Majority Whip Minnesota House DFL [**_P.S. Every year Minnesotans can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to them by the state._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wJY2Hh-z_3Ezlv4rijENsblR2UjRWpDqE0P2jpa-AXg=/Ee-nADPY3hvX0gGnC_fReKcOdZL4iDztu6HhumDHVUI=?refcode=063020PM) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wJY2Hh-z_3Ezlv4rijENsblR2UjRWpDqE0P2jpa-AXg=/Ee-nADPY3hvX0gGnC_fReKcOdZL4iDztu6HhumDHVUI=?refcode=063020PM)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: My friend Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906bb/55b66746/212d2817/80ee173/2049561338/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Right now, the most important thing for us as a nation is to defeat the most racist and dangerous president we have seen in our lifetime. What is just as important is the year, the five years, and the ten years that will follow. This is the chance of a generation. If we do not push through the most progressive agenda that this country has ever seen, if we do not dismantle the foundational and systemic racism that exists in every corner of this nation, and if we do not ensure every person has access to the mental and physical health care they need to take care of their families -- then we will have squandered our last best opportunity to build something so much better for our future. That is why we need Joe Kennedy in the U.S. Senate. We need leaders who can meet this moment. Leaders who can speak to a nation that is divided, raw, and angry. Leaders who do not turn away from suffering, but who show up whenever and wherever there are people who are sick, forgotten, or afraid. We don't have more time to waste on the politicians or policies of the past. Those that follow in our footsteps are counting on us to get this right. That means we need leaders who aren't afraid to change this country's course and to fight like hell. That's why I'm with Joe. [**If you are with me, please pitch in $5, $10, $15 to help fuel Joe 's campaign before the final end of quarter deadline before his September 1st primary so he can go on to provide this nation with the leadership it so sorely needs in the United States Senate.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906bb/55b66746/212d2817/80ee17c/2049561338/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Beto?refcode=E3910-20200630-BetoSurrogate-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-SurrogateNational-NA&amounts=3,10,20,50,100,250,other&amount=10") | _If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately:_

You are receiving this email because Joe Kennedy is relying on you to help him take his fight for the basic dignity of every American family to the United States Senate. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request only to receive the most important emails [**here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906bb/55b66746/212d2817/80ee086/2049561338/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") or you can unsubscribe **[here](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906bb/55b66746/212d2817/80ee087/2049561338/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**. | [](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Beto?refcode=E3910-20200630-BetoSurrogate-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-SurrogateNational-NA-footer&amount=10&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

"" | If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Time and again, Joe showed up for me in Texas, to fight by my side for a politics that is inclusive, compassionate, hopeful, and fair. I'm proud to show up for him today and continue that fight. -- Beto | | "" "" ""

name: Tom Cotton
subject: John Roberts Sides with Liberals AGAIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Over the past few months, I have taken a stand against the liberal mob. Now, the Left has been emboldened by a series of terrible decisions from the Supreme Court. Chief Justice John Roberts has been voting with the liberals. First, he ruled that while Obama can make up new rights for illegal immigrants through DACA, Trump can effectively never undo it. Then, Roberts ruled that Louisiana can't put common-sense regulations on abortion clinics--the same type of regulations that apply to other medical facilities.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/CottonSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42846096&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTc4MjU1MTUxOAS2&spReportId=MTc4MjU1MTUxOAS2)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4NDYwOTYS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MjU1MTUxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

Over the past few months, I have taken a stand against the liberal mob.

**Now, the Left has been emboldened by a series of terrible decisions from the Supreme Court. **

Chief Justice John Roberts has been voting with the liberals. First, he ruled that while Obama can make up new rights for illegal immigrants through DACA, Trump can effectively never undo it. Then, Roberts ruled that Louisiana can't put common-sense regulations on abortion clinics--the same type of regulations that apply to other medical facilities.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4NDYwOTYS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MjU1MTUxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

John Roberts knows that there is nothing in the Constitution prohibiting a state from requiring abortionists to meet medical standards.

He's apparently more concerned with liberal opinion than with doing the right thing.

Once again, the Supreme Court majority ignored the law, came up with a convoluted rationale to "preserve the institution", and gave a policy victory to the Left.

_**If the Chief Justice believes his political judgment is so exquisite, I invite him to resign, travel to Iowa, and get elected.**_

Do you agree?

[**If so, sign my petition to Tell John Roberts to stick to interpreting the law or resign. **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4NDYwOTYS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MjU1MTUxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter, the role of the Supreme Court is to interpret laws and the Constitution. It is unfortunate that the Chief Justice has decided it is his role to give policy victories to the radical left in order to keep winning praise from the New York Times.

But we must never give up. Instead of cowering from the mob, I say it's time for us to fight back.

[**Sign my petition to Tell John Roberts to stick to interpreting the law or resign.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4NDYwOTYS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MjU1MTUxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In service,

Tom Cotton
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4NDYwOTYS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MjU1MTUxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Friend, My finance director, Nolan, just gave me our final fundraising update before the FEC fundraising deadline tonight, and we’re $1,183 shy of where we need to be. I knew I had to reach out right away, so I’m emailing you directly.
_We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Friend,

**My finance director, Nolan, just gave me our final fundraising update before the FEC fundraising deadline tonight, and we’re $1,183 shy of where we need to be.** _I knew I had to reach out right away, so I’m emailing you directly._

Can I count on you to chip in now to help us make up the difference? [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualejune?refcode=MidnightDeadline**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18091365/216374394/-2111600035?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.30_b2_ep_all-nd&refcode2=68356864-1abb-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODM1Njg2NC0xYWJiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UTlxWTX7USiElmIoG89pgoXLgAbhMGEyZopujYDg694=)

Eugene

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Do you see what you’re doing?
body:
We’re HOURS away from the end of the second fundraising quarter.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-382190-900555-5068366-ff80f903c7-61776b4b2e)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-382190-900555-5068366-ff80f903c7-61776b4b2e) We’re HOURS away from the end of the second fundraising quarter.

My radical Democrat opponent is sitting on a war chest of $1.2 million dollars.

As Leftist PAC’s are sending her tens of thousands of dollars, I’m counting on thousands of patriots to chip in whatever they can to help me compete against a four-term incumbent.

**You’re one of those supporters and I’m counting on you Patriot.**

[**Can you pitch in $10 right now?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-382190-900555-5068366-ff80f903c7-61776b4b2e)

You may not think $10 makes a difference – **but your impact is MASSIVE**.

First, you’re helping this campaign keep going. You’re either covering the gas money for a volunteer, helping us purchase campaign material, or helping us reach 400 voters . . . [**with just $10**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-382190-900555-5068366-ff80f903c7-61776b4b2e).

But do you know what you’re REALLY doing?

By donating whatever you can, **you’re inspiring and motivating others to do the same**.

That [$10 donation](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-382190-900555-5068366-ff80f903c7-61776b4b2e) gets added to our fundraising tally that’s reported each quarter and your gift creates momentum for our campaign . . . **and that’s how we’re going to win**.

While you donate $10, another patriot in Texas is donating $25 . . .

. . . a waitress is Colorado is donating her tips from last night.

. . . a retired couple in Florida is donating $1,000 to help us win this campaign.

. . . a 2020 high school graduate is excitedly sending in $5 to participate in his first election.

Every gift matters. EVERY gift is making a statement.

Every gift is telling those establishment politicians in Washington that we’ve had enough!

We have another $25,000 to raise to hit our goal by midnight tonight. **We can do it together, and we can win.**

If you’re able, **[please chip in whatever you can afford and help us keep fighting](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-382190-900555-5068366-ff80f903c7-61776b4b2e). Help us win!**

Thank you so much for everything that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-382190-900555-5068366-ff80f903c7-61776b4b2e)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-382190-900555-84585d41bbe610b-61776b4b2e)

name: Margaret (personal)
subject: last chance — (please help)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi there,

This is the last email you’ll get from me before our end-of-quarter deadline, and I know my team and I have sent you a lot of emails in the last week, but, as you know, we are doing it because reaching our goal by midnight is of the utmost importance.

I, and our committed team of interns, volunteers, and staff, have been working day and night to make sure we hit our goals. I am proud of the work we have done — and now, we are so close to the deadline and I am asking one last time for your help.

Since I reached out this morning, so many people have stepped up to help (thank you!!) — now, we are just $2,865 short of where we need to be. We have just a few hours left — can you make a contribution before midnight? Use this link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16?refcode=em06302020PM&amount=25&recurring=1

Every contribution counts. Every contribution makes a difference.

Thank you,

Margaret

P.S. And, remember, if you donate $10 or more, we will send you one of our new bumper stickers! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16?refcode=em06302020PM&amount=25&recurring=1]

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. If you'd like to donate, click here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgfl-16-email-april2020-fr-april?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1]

If you’d like to volunteer, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LP80RLz5b0iRAiKf5peK5A2?contactdata=3Q83zMhKc8bWwhfD5YDV82V2T1OGiE%2FovK2y5PnO5ToqxUYO9iOVcucSQZJt6X2k]

If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a7b8d8b8-14ba-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74/20308f6a-1fbb-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDMwOGY2YS0xZmJiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3DpWDMsDbPXgbS9l33UAtH77yl9RJ8G1zVUHP7udNMI=&id=113801977 .

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States

Pat Hackett for Congress**

| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f478434d88&e=5886ca081d)

| Dear Friend,

Today, I am pleased to announce the endorsement of former Presidential candidate, South Bend’s own Mayor Pete Buttigieg!

Pete’s historic campaign rooted in optimism, courage, and hope reminds us of the higher values to which we are called as Americans. I am grateful to Pete for his support and endorsement. It will be my honor to serve as his representative in the US House.

Pete was kind enough to record the special message above. Please take a moment to watch.

We have an important fundraising deadline tonight at 11:59pm EDT ending the second fundraising quarter. Many eyes are on our campaign’s increasing momentum. As Pete says, I cannot do it alone!

[**Will you join Mayor Pete in supporting our campaign with an investment in Dignity and Justice for All?**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=241ae49402&e=5886ca081d)

I know I can always count on you, as a loyal supporter, to help me fight back through this unprecedented race. My campaign needs your support more than ever.
Midnight tonight marks my last opportunity to fundraise before Q2 ends. **Last quarter, my campaign was outraised by $4.7 MILLION.** My opponent has brought more money into this Senate race -- raised from out-of-state far left activists and liberal billionaires -- than Maine has ever seen before.
That is why I must ask you this: [**Can you please chip in anything to my campaign before midnight tonight? Every single donation, no matter the amount, helps me tremendously in this fight.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4NDcwODAS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MjU1NjMwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Susan

name: Taylor Klos (Team MJ)
subject: Tonight @ 11:59 p.m.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Fourteen days until the runoff. Our most important deadline is tonight.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890169/7f51f7bc/417b52c2/4ef62414/1482752661/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890169/7f51f7bc/417b52c2/4ef6240b/1482752661/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200630.2nd__1628__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

The runoff is in two weeks. _**Fourteen days**_. That's not a lot of time.

We're facing the most important end-of-quarter deadline of this campaign: tonight, at 11:59 p.m.

My numbers are telling me two things right now: **First, donations are slightly behind where we need them to be if we 're going to reach our goal before midnight. Second (and here's the good news), we can close the gap if we receive only _17 more donations from your area._**
## **[Make a matched donation now.
We'll even send you a FREE sticker to say thanks!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890169/7f51f7bc/417b52c2/4ef6240b/1482752661/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200630.2nd__1628__&amount=10")**
Closing the gap and hitting this crucial goal by 11:59 p.m. will go a long way toward shaping how people view MJ's chances in the general election against Sen. John Cornyn.

Remember: Polling shows the Senate race is within two points. With such a razor-thin margin, every goal we meet, or don't meet, _matters._ A lot.

**Please contribute today and you 'll get a free sticker (our way of saying thanks)!**

body:

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I'm a fighter, and I will fight against Nancy Pelosi and for America, every chance I get.
I was behind President Trump from the start because I knew we needed a fighter! And seeing the Democrats go off the deep edge into radical Socialism, we need fighters now more than ever.
[Can you join me in this fight](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hP2Eg5wU2pNxmng&b=t9LXhR.3SLD8CFYlc3qBwQ)? I am just a few hours from a major fundraising deadline- and I'm still $7,015 short!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hP2Eg5wU2pNxmng&b=t9LXhR.3SLD8CFYlc3qBwQ)
---

**_I cannot stand the thought of looking at Nancy Pelosi in the Speaker's chair for another Congress. Help me do better!_**

[With so little time left before the deadline, I'm relying on you. Can you be the one who puts me over the top?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hP2Eg5wU2pNxmng&b=t9LXhR.3SLD8CFYlc3qBwQ)

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi and her "kneeling radicals"! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hP2Eg5wU2pNxmng&b=t9LXhR.3SLD8CFYlc3qBwQ), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hP2Eg5wU2pNxmng&b=t9LXhR.3SLD8CFYlc3qBwQ). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hP2Eg5wU2pNxmng&b=t9LXhR.3SLD8CFYlc3qBwQ)

Entrepreneur & Military mom

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We always knew it. Now the rest of the country does, too.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
We always knew that we could win Texas, but now the rest of the country
knows as well. Fox News just released a poll showing Joe Biden up one
point over Donald Trump in the great state of Texas.

But we’re going to need your help to make the most of this opportunity –
by ensuring that we have the resources to reach every single likely
Democratic voter in Texas and then turn them out to vote on November 3rd.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42636?refcode=ema20200630-95831&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=95831%2E444211%2EoqLtRu ]Help us finish the job and defeat Donald Trump once and for all by
making a $3 contribution to Powered by People before today
ends. Right now, we need to make sure our budget is strong enough for the
road ahead.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42636?refcode=ema20200630-95831&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=95831%2E444211%2EoqLtRu ]Contribute $3

We shouldn’t take too much stock in any poll, but as someone who is deeply
concerned about the future of this country, these numbers do give me hope.

If we build on these results by getting more volunteers involved in a true
state-wide organizing effort, we can deliver the 38 electoral college
votes to Joe Biden AND win a Democratic majority in the state house in
November.

This kind of voter outreach, more than anything else, will stop Donald
Trump and Trumpism once and forever in America.

I’d love to have your help (and for those who’ve already donated, your
continued support) to do this important work.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42636?refcode=ema20200630-95831&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=95831%2E444211%2EoqLtRu ]Before this month ends, can you contribute to help Powered by People
volunteers organize all across the state? Whether you give five or fifty
dollars, everything really helps.

Thank you,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42636?refcode=ema20200630-95831&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=95831%2E444211%2EoqLtRu ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=95831%2E444211%2EoqLtRu

body:
Democrats are afraid of losing the House this year Friend, Did you see Greg’s message about the Democrats and the mainstream media?
They’re working together and they’re focused on one goal:
**Keeping Americans distracted from what’s really happening in Washington so that they can advance their anti-police, anti-free speech, and anti-conservative agenda in November.** [**STAND UP AGAINST THE DEMS AND THE MAINSTREAM MEDIA**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=d7a1d537b2ff49d4b96f8d018ec1d88a&_e=6woDBXNmfTBoywlZrCrONWOmIAbv2RJaCDzOkdlU3dQ3eVSCCfC8CZHdW6cSPMc_g_xc9p34zeMUMsECGxCXdfd0-RaSlDMnYFCSMmgDZRsSU6mpay2crDUTWqaXtTHvCRg70XlUes-2SzXBMKiSuRDovzmRlbVASb9tZPeQPW4csjb-33tJYCuY4Z7PFHUyQMBNpQOwKaCmNYm3rZxsOHBu9o0K77LWRqP1QHzupjH2AD4cmdP36_ghKgPj847dmeMUJuCd2dYBN40kRg6F4UmypLLMMqsHv9qlqo2vUq4sYisPR6RcbXUrV5ZPQQI5n2RIEjAMTO1WBg4jjr9iSLlx08nGHyql_nPDlKUJPvwncDMDI993tx2ouYAWImtuPa0vriH1TfWKAv2FeCYqQWotlGPSf1JmYEqGV5aJG3E%3D) Democrats are afraid of losing the House this year – but they’re more afraid of what Republicans will be able to accomplish if we control the White House, and all of Capitol Hill.
**That would bring long-overdue healthcare reforms, a stronger than ever before economy, and fully-funded police departments.**
That’s exactly what America needs right now, but we won’t get there with Democrats in control of Congress.
Our fundraising deadline for the 3rd quarter ends **tonight at 11:59PM,** can you chip-in and help us flip the House from blue to red? body:
Here’s a rundown of what you can do from home to act right now:

| | | We know you have a lot going on — we’ve made it easy for you.
---
| [Check Events](http://NXTGN.US/jdu) |
|
Friend,
We know there’s been a lot going on. Between protests around the world demanding justice for Black lives, the COVID-19 crisis, and a historic Pride month, it can be hard to keep track of everything. It can also be difficult to know the best way to take action and advocate for what you believe in, so we’ve been hard at work creating easy digital tools that allow you to take action on any issue you care about in under two minutes. Here are some of them:
* Urge Congress to defund and demilitarize America’s police [HERE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18092556/216398226/338354872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmMyNjQ2ZC0yNWJiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lj1D4c_HOZ22tFHDQQmjjHT1e4ffD6Yq2pE_ZNAp4A8=&emci=d65895a2-14bb-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=c6c2646d-25bb-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: Here’s a rundown of what you can do from home to act right now: | | | We know you have a lot going on — we’ve made it easy for you. | | | Friend, We know there’s been a lot going on. Between protests around the world demanding justice for Black lives, the COVID-19 crisis, and a historic Pride month, it can be hard to keep track of everything. It can also be difficult to know the best way to take action and advocate for what you believe in, so we’ve been hard at work creating easy digital tools that allow you to take action on any issue you care about in under two minutes. Here are some of them: Urge Congress to defund and demilitarize America’s police Congress’s COVID relief program is about to expire -- call for them to continue relief action Demand that Congress end discriminatory bans on blood donations from gay men In the midst of a global pandemic, Congress must guarantee all voters the power to cast mail-in ballots in November. Let them know Tell Congress to make Juneteenth a national holiday Write to the Mayor of Louisville to demand justice for Breonna Taylor In Solidarity, Emmet Sandberg State Digital Director NextGen Pennsylvania | NextGen America** 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: asap please
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friend, I just left City Hall where our idiotic City Council is voting to defund the police department. It was complete chaos down there because the Council is set to cut $1 billion from the police budget. That cut is enough to completely eliminate the NYPD’s anti-terrorism efforts until the year 2026.
| | | | Friend,

I just left City Hall where our idiotic City Council is voting to defund the police department. It was complete chaos down there because the Council is set to cut $1 billion from the police budget. That cut is enough to completely eliminate the NYPD’s anti-terrorism efforts until the year 2026.

Defunding the police is stupid, wrong, and downright dangerous. I’m furious and frankly I’m scared.

We have to win this race so I can get to Congress to stop New York politicians and politicians in cities across our country from defunding the police and leaving our neighborhoods at the mercy of criminals.

It’s June 30th so tonight at midnight is our final regular fundraising deadline before election day and we need to have a huge showing to fight back against these radicals who want to defund the police, radicals like my opponent Max Rose.

If you can [chip in $25, $50, or even $150 before midnight](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=196A294A1A3812) we’ll send the message that we’re going to win and that we’re going to support communities, not criminals.**

Nicole**

Hi Friend, We wanted to be sure you saw this message from Rick. It's incredibly important. We're only a few hundred dollars away from hitting your fundraising goal for the quarter. [Can you click here and pitch in before midnight to help push us over the top](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18092766/216404032/-1907457919?refcode=RKC_06302020_eom5_FFL1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc4ZWZjNy0yN2JiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PT9p-ruQQxuhNW3bawN5Umvi3lyRXBqBNy1XYFtrgGE=)? Thanks, and be safe. Team Kennedy ***** Begin Forwarded Message *****
* * *
Dear Friend, With COVID-19 cases escalating rapidly, I urge you all to enjoy the upcoming July 4th holiday in the safest possible manner. Maintain social distancing, avoid prolonged indoor gatherings, and please wear your mask when in public. There's another risk we need to be aware of - the risk of letting Pete Sessions sneak back into Congress. Sessions served in Congress from 1997 to 2019. Over that span he:
* Supported the 1033 program, allowing transfer of surplus military equipment to local law enforcement agencies
* Opposed allowing states to determine their own cannabis policies
* Supported a plan to dismantle the Office of Congressional Ethics
* Voted against the DREAM Act
* Voted repeatedly to repeal the ACA, and remove protections for pre-existing conditions, with no suitable replacement

Essentially, the exact opposite of my positions. We can't let him sneak back into Congress and pick up where he left off. **Friend, can you chip in $5, $10, or even $20 to help us meet our quarterly goal and beat Pete in November? [You can click here to send us a donation of any amount.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18092767/216404033/-1907457919?refcode=RKC_06302020_eom4_FFl2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc4ZWZjNy0yN2JiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PT9p-ruQQxuhNW3bawN5Umvi3lyRXBqBNy1XYFtrgGE=)** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18092768/216404034/1282705599?refcode=RKC_06302020_eom4FF_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc4ZWZjNy0yN2JiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PT9p-ruQQxuhNW3bawN5Umvi3lyRXBqBNy1XYFtrgGE=)** | **[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18092769/216404035/1282705599?refcode=RKC_06302020_eom4FF_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc4ZWZjNy0yN2JiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PT9p-ruQQxuhNW3bawN5Umvi3lyRXBqBNy1XYFtrgGE=)** | **[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18092770/216404036/1282705599?refcode=RKC_06302020_eom4FF_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc4ZWZjNy0yN2JiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PT9p-ruQQxuhNW3bawN5Umvi3lyRXBqBNy1XYFtrgGE=)**

#
Believe it or not, team, Cory currently has FIVE Republican opponents trying to defeat him. With **one week left until the primary election and our next FEC fundraising deadline tonight at midnight,** we absolutely have to pick up the pace if we're going to hit our goal and put Cory in a strong position for the general election. We all know that Cory is working tirelessly right now in the Senate to pass the Justice in Policing Act and a new COVID-19 relief package. The more resources we can raise from grassroots contributions online, the more he can focus on delivering results for the American people. **So what do you say: can you pitch in to support Cory as he faces five Republican opponents before our most important deadline of this campaign yet?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-jun2020?refcode=cab-em-200630-eoq-120day&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Michelle (personal)
subject: quick check-in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
I want to take a moment and make a personal appeal ahead of our crucial FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.

_My number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._
Hi friends,

I want to take a moment and make a personal appeal ahead of our crucial FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.

I know, every quarter we go through this. I email you to let you know we have a goal to reach. Can I also admit that I know you receive many emails saying the same thing? And that every month you read the same messages. However, this quarter is very special. We are about to enter our primary season and I want to not only meet our goal, but also be in a solid financial position to reach our voters with our message of unity, competence, and compassion.

To add to the excitement, our campaign was just selected as one of only 24 districts across the nation to join the DCCC's Red to Blue program. This means our race will have support to reach our voters, because in the end, each quarter is nothing but a check-in on how much money we are raising to reach our voters so that we can win.

I'm ready to go to Congress to lift your voice. But we are getting down to the wire, and we won't be able to hit our FEC goal without your help. Please consider chipping in $10 or more before midnight tonight to help push us over the finish line.

We can do this, we will stand up for Kansas, together. [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdli-june-eoq**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18093015/216411384/977494464?gpsid=8_122_13783&refcode=em20_200630_eoq6_fnd_gq_ful__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200630_eoq6_fnd_gq_ful__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmUxYjY1MS0yYWJiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=83u3j4gCQ6ttaRU4B4uNLO6-RBoLy8gYnKdPYvBfl74=)

In partnership,

Michelle

PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
Michelle for Kansas
PO Box 67101
Topeka, KS 66667

subject: I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
After tonight's midnight fundraising deadline, we'll decide how much we can invest in electing Democrats across the country this year. We haven't hit our goal yet. But we need to. This is an important | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250b7/45c30650/1cfcf4987/66e9a112/2951927702/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'll just get right to it:

After tonight's midnight fundraising deadline, we'll decide how much we can invest in electing Democrats across the country this year.

We haven't hit our goal yet. But we need to.

This is an important milestone we'll face before the most important election of our lifetimes, and the work we do right now will help decide the outcome in November.

**[I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: If you can, will you chip in $2 or whatever makes sense right now?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250b7/45c30650/1cfcf4987/66e9a115/2951927702/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzMxRl9FT1FfRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA2MzBfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS31F_EOQ_EWD_E_20200630_V1S2_P")**

After we see where we land tonight, we'll set our plans.

And we need to hit our goal to fully fund our aggressive plans for persistent, person-to-person organizing.

If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can keep growing our grassroots movement.

We can win the White House, take back the Senate, keep the House, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

We can beat the special interests, root out corruption, and put power in the hands of the people.

**But it's only possible if we each do what we can -- so I'm asking if you can be a part of this fight today.

[If it makes sense for you right now, please donate to support Warren Democrats and help make our country work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250b7/45c30650/1cfcf4987/66e9a115/2951927702/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzMxRl9FT1FfRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA2MzBfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS31F_EOQ_EWD_E_20200630_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: Trump is taking away healthcare in a global pandemic
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTTniqI7_KL19c0t_QR6I65vDV0Plg1yjjP5-tiCgMj012YYDGRmcwzF9JlnaQvHP-i4M_prxYxSME2Lfu1JQYwUsrqaJDsRtEUT9PdBVejCH9Px04kXzfoSiQnJgfenkaUgve7nxEZ5MHc9YsHl7RQvP4cN_IdmoeXXH2HlKlxrnLSHObuleWmOHOsh_XXenn/332/FQvbf0SBQsGv5CG1IPr6Cg/h0/vqplphUDwNWrqYIyUwiU8moX0RHxEf2YEhB1PvkdVFc) Friend,

It’s hard to imagine a moment when the Affordable Care Act is more vital than in a global pandemic — particularly a pandemic that targets people with pre-existing conditions.

Perhaps harder to imagine is a President who sees that same moment as his chance to erase the ACA and the protections it ensures for those very same people.

But this is Trump’s America, where the only relevant protections are those which tighten his grip on the White House.

On June 25th, the Trump Administration asked the Supreme Court to overturn the ACA, a law that prohibits American insurance providers from denying coverage to individuals who, quite simply, **have been deemed unprofitable.**

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0n5Qb5xjaWQ-ETscSkvkipr0z-tXS-YzTqrn3xkEeo8tjnvyxb0G6tXaqg4O4ylHofZlsv9LUOctDUdPXzzSWXo-5efS-4qOrULz2fz9tyWljRxlw9V0MGLFt_B3p5OWEoZRk_lhYzQwBMR24g4XQW7WkaOsmfc08M3d_YntNJSIhHNFzBx-BvW4ggTEzXzNaf8kmu-2aapDedV1yyoIwm8wn9XdzFV7FHyj1-mCDV2Ov0SNdf6gs6By0tpQXaB5DMMBPhcUzYqdg2lCBv-cLnrnQGmncHpxC0Q_zbPG4Z5W/332/FQvbf0SBQsGv5CG1IPr6Cg/h1/ssNwlalIyO1yxSW0GSsIQRxZ5LtDEqLYiUiCYs7YwGA) It’s the next chapter in his **“Repeal And Replace”** campaign that still refuses to address the question, _“With what?”_

But Americans who understand the power of the ACA — **[Americans like Kristy Spainhour](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmUF0wlvG_cxFLesDKYblbv-_QVUSCysUhsdjdySiDugd9kl7LxNHh89gk8W97p9hWhZaogeyYFOclaLo5QRkpbAUuLZu5dlG8Q5_2-XxQNz0bPuFmltShNeMQx0Kv4PSARq_ERdasL7H9bVxiUuAPxPTDDifsl0w63dj9th73OoJb3VMkw6ob_UQQJU_ivrOX78-vNJVck--5poTrlaHAGtPsUxsKoLiExbO3CZ2eL7_iRHnQbpjThz_jsdajmObCznVKylQf1Vvmic9Rb2yaogfH0eFOlNEC2CORjFk5P90/332/FQvbf0SBQsGv5CG1IPr6Cg/h2/-UkYLma1a-Of-hcNVhfQswZdLiCAifEZEdmArWXIcEw)** — see this move as the political posturing that is it. Smack in the middle of a pandemic that could very well leave **all of its survivors** with new pre-existing conditions, Donald Trump is attacking their greatest protection to score easy points with his base.

clean_body: | | | Friend, It’s hard to imagine a moment when the Affordable Care Act is more vital than in a global pandemic — particularly a pandemic that targets people with pre-existing conditions. Perhaps harder to imagine is a President who sees that same moment as his chance to erase the ACA and the protections it ensures for those very same people. But this is Trump’s America, where the only relevant protections are those which tighten his grip on the White House. On June 25th, the Trump Administration asked the Supreme Court to overturn the ACA, a law that prohibits American insurance providers from denying coverage to individuals who, quite simply, have been deemed unprofitable. It’s the next chapter in his “Repeal And Replace” campaign that still refuses to address the question, “With what?” But Americans who understand the power of the ACA — — see this move as the political posturing that is it. Smack in the middle of a pandemic that could very well leave all of its survivors with new pre-existing conditions, Donald Trump is attacking their greatest protection to score easy points with his base. Americans like Kristy see through the facade, and we need you to boost her voice. She’s calling out Trump on the special interests he represents — and referencing the husband she would no longer have if those interests had gotten their way. The Defeat Disinfo Team P.S. Trump will protect his second term before he protects American lives, If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies. | | Sent via . clean_body: Friend, It’s Nick. I wanted to reach out to you personally because our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is just THAT important. My team reached out earlier to let you know we’re behind Abigail Spanberger, and that’s still true -- but supporters like you are helping out more than you know. We’re only $1,470 away from tonight's goal. I’ve activated 4X MATCHING so we can reach it. Can you help us reach it and show Nancy Pelosi that my team and I are NOT to be messed with? Thank you sincerely, Nick From: Nick's Campaign Manager Subject: TAKE BACK THE HOUSE Date: June 30, 2020 at 10:30:00 AM EDT To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This is urgent. Nick is the best shot Virginia has to bring conservative values back to the Commonwealth. We know he is the only candidate out there who CAN take on Abigail, but here’s the thing, Friend. We’re behind Abigail’s fundraising efforts. We’re $3,015 short of our goal, so we’ve activated 3X MATCHING! The truth is, Friend, that Nancy Pelosi will see our FEC fundraising numbers right after this deadline. We need to show her that we won’t back down from supporting Nick’s journey to the House. Thank you, Joe D. Nick’s Campaign Manager Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet?=
subject: LAST CHANCE TO VOTE ⏰
body:
Polls are still open till 7:00 |
---
| | Peter, **Polls are still open for a few more hours!**

Months of listening to voters, making phone calls, canvassing the district and knocking on doors, and it all comes down to these final hours.

**I just wanted to say thank you from the bottom of my heart for joining us in this fight.**

I'm the conservative that's going to beat liberal Democrat Kendra Horn in November. [Please be sure to get out and vote and remind your friends!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ee1b64121b&e=795c6d9796)

I also wanted to make sure you get the invitation for our [Election Night Victory Party](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=50f93a193f&e=795c6d9796).

We'll be at Clark Crew BBQ in Oklahoma City starting at 7:00 when the polls close. [You can RSVP here](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=11a8abd6cd&e=795c6d9796).

Thank you so much for fighting with us! I'm honored that you've chosen to stand by our side.

For Oklahoma,
Janet Barresi
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9b0058f2510e/calling-all-patriots-12548790?e=795c6d9796)
---

Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Stop the Insanity!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/stop-theinsanity?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| | We need to [stop the insanity](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=a52e0200d1&e=41f8e27552)!
I am running for the U.S. Senate to bring conservative leadership to Washington and move Kansas forward. I am a businessman, not a career politician, and I want to go to Washington to drain the swamp and help my fellow Kansans. I believe in term limits and the idea of citizen legislators. I will not be beholden to special interest and lobbyists. My focus will be on helping Kansans not looking for another office to run for. As your next Senator I will stand up to Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders and AOC and tell them that Kansans are not going to stand by and let them push their socialist agenda on us! We’re seeing the socialist agenda come to Kansas, we’re seeing businesses and churches closed and calls to defund the police. Those are not Kansas values! [Please check out my new ad](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=1490b003dc&e=41f8e27552) to learn more about why I am running for the Senate.
Dave. _P.S. – Please help me get my message out to Kansans that_ I will stand _up to Nancy Pelosi, Bernie Sanders and AOC by clicking on the logo below to contribute to my campaign._ _[](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=7accedfd7a&e=41f8e27552)_

subject: Everyone will see what's in this report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | We might not meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, Peter.

Here's what happens if we don't raise the last $4,019 we need this quarter:

_
* Mike Garcia and his corporate PAC donors get to tell themselves that special interest money can overpower grassroots enthusiasm.
* We have to cut back on our campaign plans in the final months before Election Day and can't win over the supporters we need to turn out for Christy.
* We lose the edge in our top-tier rematch race -- and that means we risk losing the Democratic majority in the House of Representatives.
_

**[Rush a donation of $5 or more before midnight to show the GOP money machine that people -- not corporations -- should decide who represents our district>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba23/29776869/9c41573/569ed49d/3408622203/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xOS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq9-full")**

Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight just reported that Garcia has voted with Donald Trump **100% of the time** during his first month and a half of Congress, so you can bet that Trump and his allies will go all out to buy his re-election in November.

But while Garcia is boosted by special interest groups, corporate PAC money, and powerful D.C. political groups, Team Christy is proud to rely on small-dollar donations from supporters like you.

**Every dollar we raise before midnight tonight goes in a public report to the FEC** \-- each donation shows Garcia's backers that the folks of CA-25 are ready to elect a real leader for our district.

**[Peter, we have just one question: If you're all in for Christy, will you contribute $5 RIGHT NOW to push us over the finish line?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba23/29776869/9c41573/569ed49d/3408622203/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xOS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq9-full")**

Thanks,

Christy's Finance Team

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba23/29776869/9c41573/569ed49d/3408622203/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xOS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq9-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba23/29776869/9c41573/569ed49d/3408622203/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xOS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq9-full")

name: Mark Warner
subject: Meaningful change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This is the first time I've written to you directly since my Republican opponent won the GOP nomination. I want to talk to you about what's on my mind at this critical point in the election cycle.
|
---

| | Derek,

This is the first time I've written to you directly since my Republican opponent won the GOP nomination. I want to talk to you about what's on my mind at this critical point in the election cycle. I would say the stakes couldn't be higher, but the truth is, with each passing day it seems like we get another reminder of how much worse things could get if we fail to beat Donald Trump and flip the Senate this November.

We are facing an unprecedented pandemic that has already claimed 120,000 of our fellow Americans and a President unable to see this virus through any lens but his own re-election prospects. We see it not only in his erratic leadership, but also in his ongoing efforts to block safe and secure mail-in voting.

The President's failure to contain the virus has led to the worst unemployment crisis since the Great Depression. Like the coronavirus, this economic catastrophe has hit our most vulnerable the hardest. And this will only get worse if the Trump administration is successful in its efforts to dismantle the Affordable Care Act in the courts.

All of this is happening during an overdue moment of reckoning about systemic racism in our policing, in our health care system, and in our economy. Yet instead of a meaningful debate, we have a President tweeting out "white power" videos and leadership in the Senate that would rather score political points than pass meaningful bi-partisan police reform.

Why am I saying all this? Because in Virginia, where we have elections every year, politicians say all the time that "this is the most important election." But this year, it really is true.

I'm running for re-election because we have one chance to turn our country around. That means holding this seat, flipping the United States Senate, and sending Joe Biden to the White House. Now that I've got a pro-Trump Republican opponent, things are about to get even more serious. We know Donald Trump is personally targeting Virginia -- he's said it himself. That means I need your help to continue building a campaign that can compete against the Republicans pouring money into Virginia and weather the challenges of coronavirus and social distancing.

So, I am personally asking you today for your help before tonight's deadline, the first Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline since my opponent secured the GOP nomination.

**[If you've been thinking about whether or not to make that first contribution, now is the time. Please, Derek, will you make your first contribution to help us hit this can't-miss fundraising goal?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbe3/53d9897e/545b2866/1c884bf8/1511079137/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-markeom?refcode=20200630_f_1_nd__636__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Let me level with you: this is not going to be easy. The biggest mistake we can make is to look at the polls and assume everything will be fine. A lot of people made that mistake in 2016, and with my race in 2014 when it came down to one percentage point. I'm not taking anything for granted -- I'm ready to roll up my sleeves and work until the job is done. We are going to run the best grassroots campaign we can and compete for every single vote. That is how we beat Donald Trump, keep Virginia blue, and bring about real change in this country. **[I need your help to make it happen.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbe3/53d9897e/545b2866/1c884be7/1511079137/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-markeom?refcode=20200630_f_1_nd__636__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

It means so much to me to have your support as we head into this critical election. Together, we can win this November and finally begin to turn our country around.

Sincerely,
Mark Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbe3/53d9897e/545b2866/1c884be6/1511079137/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-markeom?refcode=20200630_f_1_nd__636__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbe3/53d9897e/545b2866/1c884be5/1511079137/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Team Hicks
subject: One last request
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
We won the Kentucky primary in a landslide, and we did it with grassroots supporters like you on our side. Now we just have one more request.

---
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18093932/216429823/11263012?refcode=20200630_em_fr_eoq8_all_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWVkOWQwMC0zMmJiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W3tEZUMvLxfvVGcQUYpDO8QyScbpCW9f8dd2qMByBx4=)
---
| Dear friends, I hope you saw Josh’s message earlier. We won the Kentucky primary in a landslide, and we did it with grassroots supporters like you on our side. Now we just have one more request. [_**Can you chip in before midnight to help us cross the finish line and pass our 2nd Quarter fundraising goal?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18093933/216429824/11263012?refcode=20200630_em_fr_eoq8_all_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWVkOWQwMC0zMmJiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W3tEZUMvLxfvVGcQUYpDO8QyScbpCW9f8dd2qMByBx4=) Thanks to folks like you chipping in whatever they could we were able to put up ads, connect with voters, and get our message out to folks across Kentucky’s 6th district. | | Friends -

There isn’t a ton of time, so I’m going to keep this short.

Today is the final day of our first fundraising deadline of 2020. Thanks to all my grassroots supporters, we had a fantastic initial report back in 2019.

I want to make this another banner fundraising period, but my finance team says we are still $2,650 shy of hitting our goal - it's going to take a heroic effort but I'm confident we can do it.

Will you chip in **BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT** and help us crush our January-June fundraising goal? You can make a donation at this secure link:
[https://secure.winred.com/douglas-for-state-house/donate](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=81d492349a&e=4f010155df)

Thanks for your help,
Will

\--------------- Forwarded Message ----------------

From: Ashley
Date: Tuesday, June 30, 2020 at 4:11 PM
To: Will Douglas
Subject: close to meeting our goal

Hi Will,

It’s Ashley from the Finance Team. I know our fundraising goal was an aggressive one, and we are getting pretty close, but as of 4:00 PM this afternoon we are still $2,650 short.

The end of period deadline is midnight tonight, so unless we get a major last-minute push from our grassroots supporters, we're going to come up just short.

Thanks,
Ashley
_Douglas for State House Finance Team_
