name: MJ
subject: A few things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Let's finish these last two weeks strong, win the runoff, and beat Sen. Cornyn.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890174/7f51f7bc/417c5a7e/4ef62675/2357818779/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, it's MJ.

Real quick, there are a few things I wanted to mention: (1) Our final end-of-quarter deadline before the runoff election is 11:59 pm _tonight_. Y'all, since the runoff is in two weeks, this is our most crucial deadline yet. **[Can you make a donation (of any amount) before then?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890174/7f51f7bc/417c5a7e/4ef62674/2357818779/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200630.3nd__1639__&amount=10")**

(2) If you pitch in by 11:59 pm, your donation will be **matched** for double the impact.

(3) Finally, if you contribute before the deadline, we'll send you a free bumper sticker as a small token of our appreciation. **Peter, I know we can do this. We can win this runoff and come out of it fired up and ready to beat Sen. John Cornyn in the general election. We just need to finish strong these last two weeks. Then, onward to November.**

I'm so damn proud of this team. Thanks for being a part of it.

MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890174/7f51f7bc/417c5a7e/4ef62674/2357818779/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200630.3nd__1639__&amount=10")**

---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890174/7f51f7bc/417c5a7e/4ef6266b/2357818779/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1639&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890174/7f51f7bc/417c5a7e/4ef6266a/2357818779/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 100 years of women’s suffrage
body:
On August 18, 1920, the 19th amendment to the U.S. Constitution was ratified.

https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7fc64c530&e=3ee4985eea
The White House • June 30, 2020

** 100 years of women’s suffrage
------------------------------------------------------------
On August 18, 1920, the 19th amendment to the U.S. Constitution was ratified. Eight days later, it was officially adopted, securing the right to vote for American women.

To honor the 100th anniversary of this historic event, First Lady Melania Trump announced an exhibit titled Building the Movement: America’s Youth Celebrate 100 Years of Women’s Suffrage.

The exhibit will feature artwork submitted by young Americans (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3eb5faa449&e=3ee4985eea) , alongside images of women’s suffrage parades, marches, and civic gatherings.

“It’s important to include our children in the conversation so they can learn and understand the history behind the women’s suffrage movement,” First Lady Melania Trump said.

“It is my hope that this project will both support and expand the important conversations taking place on equality and the impact of peaceful protests, while encouraging children to engage in the history behind this consequential movement in their own home state.”

Learn more about the First Lady’s exhibit. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=26d8c423df&e=3ee4985eea)

** President Trump is making sure states have what they need to fight Coronavirus
------------------------------------------------------------
Vice President Mike Pence led a virtual meeting yesterday between the White House Coronavirus Task Force and Governors across America.

“We are continuing to work with all of our Governors as some states see an increase in cases,” Vice President Pence tweeted. “We assured the Governors today that their states will have what they need when they need it.”

In Dallas on Sunday, the Vice President delivered a simple message: “We’re all in this together. And, Governor [Abbott], you know I’m a phone call away.”

President Trump’s Coronavirus Guidelines, first unveiled in March, helped slow the spread of disease while America launched the largest mobilization of industry since World War II. Now armed with the strongest testing system of any nation on Earth, U.S. Governors are well prepared to continue managing local outbreaks of the virus as needed.

“What the American people should know,” Vice President Pence said in an interview, “is that because of the leadership that President Trump has provided [and] because of the extraordinary innovation that we have brought to this task, we are in a much better place to respond to these outbreaks than we were four months ago.”

🎬 Watch: Far fewer Americans require hospitalization today (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=08067a3483&e=3ee4985eea)

In photos: Vice President Pence and Task Force meet with Governors (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2487957a1c&e=3ee4985eea)

The White House • June 30, 2020 100 years of women’s suffrage On August 18, 1920, the 19th amendment to the U.S. Constitution was ratified. Eight days later, it was officially adopted, securing the right to vote for American women. To honor the 100th anniversary of this historic event, First Lady Melania Trump announced an exhibit titled Building the Movement: America’s Youth Celebrate 100 Years of Women’s Suffrage. The exhibit will feature artwork submitted by young Americans () , alongside images of women’s suffrage parades, marches, and civic gatherings. “It’s important to include our children in the conversation so they can learn and understand the history behind the women’s suffrage movement,” First Lady Melania Trump said. “It is my hope that this project will both support and expand the important conversations taking place on equality and the impact of peaceful protests, while encouraging children to engage in the history behind this consequential movement in their own home state.” Learn more about the First Lady’s exhibit. I need you to please act soon, Peter.
Gratefully,
Lisa Scheller \--------Forwarded Message Below-------- Peter, As June draws to a close, I can’t help but look back at how huge of a month it has been for Team Scheller.
We have not only been endorsed by some top conservative leaders in the nation, but we also successfully clinched the Republican nomination to face Nancy Peosi’s ally, Radical Susan Wild.
But Peter, as our momentum has continued to increase, the Far-Left and their attacks continue to get worse. [**STOP THE RADICALS**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=f1b75d45f92143f7ad44e51132859082&_e=u3ieEXqehdr6Z_eo80Vz5svUKLgep0_hUMSeSb5KW0XDcYJql9mwrqVZ7O-_bvuYyG49WNmupiUF0LumCNKzyZfaCSgZzq9BImaicfCuCDG2Aw5gvk334JlF0kO83VqT-X6ER79c8I9Y04q4dnxEjkN8QzEESCi3DWQNKiHdLZCok_djEm5EPD_bTVpz82qU7sa0Lx6Sy8JKXHIVd3A9m2skJv5pVBjoWxNGjwttLI8gwpCJ7xrM7FkvKsBVnnbxz_tXV_aFU32wrskRe0z4n8OubYHHegHUDEneGNVPZSN3apVRog4CnLdyz1LGBFpf0GtmA_UzlFIncFN_tlOASBVtv9eyi0dMMNuz7YiIySzYBID8fLed37XXc7zUhfi_830L8fpB9fQeXIlSftlMk_6kPtsrLrEKlcLgX6i8rwUcuSF8YzCAjL8jx-cX9qKCLbwGvXc-Rd_hl04OFgiqUw%3D%3D) The last thing the Far-Left radicals want to see is the collectivism that has taken place the last few weeks over the simple idea that we cannot let a Radical, Far-Left Democrat continue to represent the Lehigh Valley.
She does not represent us.
It’s time to bring our conservative values to Washington--Not values comprised of increased taxes, sanctuary cities, and the Green New Deal.
Peter, this is the exact reason I’m reaching out to you right now -- to do something about the above potential reality. This all sits in our hands. WE have the very power through our donations and our votes to make a difference that will impact the Valley for many years to come.

But Peter, as our momentum has continued to increase, the Far-Left and their attacks continue to get worse. The last thing the Far-Left radicals want to see is the collectivism that has taken place the last few weeks over the simple idea that we cannot let a Radical, Far-Left Democrat continue to represent the Lehigh Valley. She does not represent us. It’s time to bring our conservative values to Washington--Not values comprised of increased taxes, sanctuary cities, and the Green New Deal. Peter, this is the exact reason I’m reaching out to you right now -- to do something about the above potential reality. This all sits in our hands. WE have the very power through our donations and our votes to make a difference that will impact the Valley for many years to come. As this quarter draws to a close and we report the past few month’s contributions to the FEC, will you double down on your typical donation to make sure that we keep this momentum rolling into the next few months to where we claim victory on November 3rd? | | Team: Our opponent Bill Hagerty said he's never seen the president "do anything that I think jeopardizes America's position in the world." It's disqualifying. **Tennesseans can 't afford to send another rubber stamp and silent enabler to the Senate.** [_**James is a combat veteran who 's in this race to do the right thing and he'll stand up to any president when they're wrong. body:
We have a few hours before we have to close the books on June. If we don’t hit this goal we will need to increase our fundraising goals even more next Peter, I’ll keep this short. We have a few hours before we have to close the books on June. If we don’t hit this goal we will need to increase our fundraising goals even more next month and beyond to make up for it. Peter, this deadline will dictate our goals for the rest of the year and if we have a strong month it will make it that much easier for the rest of the year. Can you chip in now? When we first started our end of quarter fundraising push, I have to be honest I was a little worried with how much ground we needed to make up. But the response we have seen thus far has been incredible. While we haven’t hit our goal we are very close. **[Can you rush an immediate donation of just $10 to finish off our goal for the quarter?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=2ee1128fc4d24dccb19219e6d8158933&_e=7qXCH4ilxnXJ2V9VpFFEXYnI3Vr-X-GWaetXyAP3vVR9C7FSwa_OoG_WwRKKh0DzNCq7aLoXNcnkOXwSDS3Br0hbT11p3XkrRkRJurLEiRM8Vj0lujpFZmbiWpUBQ5CaXVI_Tj2T_KfYwwRwcJhIpzGJBua6XwvxWAgXPK8wWIKiV0lINSNpZOst9Tg82bb54Jl9YepgSi0K5FS7jAarDmEkJdxw41fAMeoYjyJRKHVE2y5e5JbtGoptfvIlw940nfSZ4qq7KFxx1P_hrW1SS1SA-uaMeT9hYtKJpx9D1XVk7zLuAWf4g4fkeoX6TIIecPogXH5e2S6EcyYIuntkeeaJC4e_aunCeXFvJ_jnfdCSEhqgdKiu4aFZVmIOJ_5B45rZsKjmWrWXN2QeWVPyt3KrFSHZf91o2T_DYFZtMAT9gkyw3qdvP8J-Pmz6liUZ)** Thanks, Rob Portman \---------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, I am reaching back out with an important update. **The good news:** We have narrowed the gap and are now only $36,149 away from hitting our goal for the month.

**The bad news:** We only have a few hours left to hit our goal. Honestly, I am worried what will happen if we don’t hit this June goal. It could encourage the far-left to invest more resources in Ohio. All my best, | "Donate" | "Download Contribution Form" | "About Tracey" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc. | Our mailing address is: P.O. Box 1084 Salina, KS 67402 Each individual may donate up to $2,800 per primary and $2,800 per general election from personal funds. Contributions in excess of the primary election limit will be designated for the general election. Contributions or gifts to Mann for Congress, Inc. are not tax deductible. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. name: Tom Cotton
subject: Send a Message to the Liberal Mob
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Over the past few months, I have taken a stand against the liberal mob. Now, the Left has been emboldened by a series of terrible decisions from the Supreme Court. Chief Justice John Roberts has been voting with the liberals. First, he ruled that while Obama can make up new rights for illegal immigrants through DACA, Trump can effectively never undo it. Then, Roberts ruled that Louisiana can't put common-sense regulations on abortion clinics—the same type of regulations that apply to other medical facilities.Click here to unsubscribe http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/CottonSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42848788&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTgwMDAwMDgyOAS2&spReportId=MTgwMDAwMDgyOAS2
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4NDg3ODgS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDAwMDgyOAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter, This is the fight of our lifetime.

The liberal mob has taken over the corporate world, they run our colleges, and they own the media. And if they get their way, they’ll take over the Presidency and the Senate.

I’m standing up to stop them. Instead of giving in to the mob, it’s time to go on offense and fight back. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4NDg3ODgS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDAwMDgyOAS2&mt=1&rt=0

I’ll be honest. I have INFURIATED the Left, and frankly, I am proud of it http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4NDg3ODgS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDAwMDgyOAS2&mt=1&rt=0
So, want to help make the mob mad? Want to upset the woke children at the New York Times who tried to cancel me?

If you do, we’ve got just a few hours until the deadline and we are in danger of missing our goal. If we come up short, the mob will be thrilled. But if we announce a big quarter, they’ll have to go to their safe spaces to cry.

Let’s fight back.

Please, anything you can give--even $5--will help meet our goal and help me stand up to the mob.

I won’t stop fighting for what is right. I won’t be bullied by the angry mob. Most importantly, I will NEVER let liberals transform the United States into a socialist state.

I hope I can count on you to stand with me in this fight and keep liberal extremists out of Congress.

DONATE $25 http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI4NDg3ODgS1&kn=24&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDAwMDgyOAS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: Christy Smith
subject: This is a little long. But it's important. So I hope you'll take the time to read.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

**After the 2016 presidential election, I watched as my daughters looked at our nation and wondered what had gone wrong.**

How a person who bragged about assaulting women, vilified immigrants and espoused racist beliefs, ridiculed a reporter with a disability, and vowed to lock up his political rivals could have been elected president.

Whether they could trust that their elected leaders would fight for the values we believe in: equality, justice, compassion, and dignity for all.

If our country could ever be one where all of us are truly considered equal.

My girls knew that it was time for all of us to stand up for what they believe in, and I wasn't going to let them down -- that's why I ran for state Assembly in 2018, where I'm proud to fight for quality education for all our kids, expanding access to affordable health care, and to protect our reproductive rights.

**[Now I'm running for the House of Representatives, because my children -- and yours -- deserve to see leaders in their government who are in it for _people_ , not partisan politics and personal gain. If you're all in to fight for the progressive values we share, please chip in $5 or more before our crucial end-of-quarter deadline at midnight.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed71e/2302296971/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq10-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed71f/2302296971/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq10-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed718/2302296971/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq10-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed719/2302296971/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq10-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed71a/2302296971/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq10-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed71b/2302296971/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq10-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed71e/2302296971/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq10-full")
Some things haven't changed in the four years since Donald Trump was elected.

His rhetoric remains partisan, radical, and repugnant (I wouldn't have expected anything less), and far-right Republicans like Mike Garcia have fallen in line behind him.

We're in the midst of a pandemic, and Trump, Garcia, and other GOP politicians are failing us -- and costing lives. We knew that when Trump faced his first real crisis, he couldn't step up to the challenge. And now, according to FiveThirtyEight's tracker, Mike Garcia is in Congress voting with Trump 100% of the time.

**But we have also seen people rise up for change** \-- from the Women's March on the very day after Trump's inauguration, to the Blue Wave that took back the House in 2018, to the peaceful protests for racial equality still occurring across the nation.

**We have proven that change is possible, and that there are people everywhere who will fight to make our country a better place for everyone.**

**[In 2018, Democratic activists like you flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in 25 years. I know that we can do it again this November. Are you with me, Peter? Chip in $5 or more before midnight so we can show Mike Garcia that this district is ready for a real leader.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed71e/2302296971/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq10-full")**

Thanks for being in the fight with me, my girls, and all of us who know that America can only be great when every one of us is treated with the respect we deserve.

\-- Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed71e/2302296971/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq10-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed71e/2302296971/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MzBfZW9xMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200630_eoq10-full")
---

777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed715/2302296971/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba1e/29776869/9c69d25/569ed716/2302296971/VEsHBg/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Katie - Campaign Manager
subject: Last Chance To Make A Difference!
body:
| [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4ca_GN8PVgs7p4lFczZdWH4OS2J_wdNMUxMiFMEDAm6OhMzOXYWo73WEDpi0rxznYU5QuwBcS_PNTDsaVjcFANEzw&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_eoq_4&n=1) Friend, I'm Katie, Amanda's campaign manager and I'm reaching out to remind everyone that tonight is our deadline for the end of this quarter, the most important deadline of this campaign. I know we send you all a lot, but this deadline could make or break the campaign. [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4ca_GN8PVgs7p4lFczZdWH4OS2J_wdNMUxMiFMEDAm6OhMzOXYWo73WEDpi0rxznYU5QuwBcS_PNTDsaVjcFANEzw&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_eoq_4&n=2) We are SO CLOSE to reaching our end of quarter goal and that much closer to beating Charlie Crist. Will you be one of the final contributors to help us win this primary? Click below to make a contribution. | [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4ca_GN8PVgs7p4lFczZdWH4OS2J_wdNMUxMiFMEDAm6OhMzOXYWo73WEDpi0rxznYU5QuwBcS_PNTDsaVjcFANEzw&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_eoq_4&n=3 "CLICK HERE") [CLICK HERE](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4ca_GN8PVgs7p4lFczZdWH4OS2J_wdNMUxMiFMEDAm6OhMzOXYWo73WEDpi0rxznYU5QuwBcS_PNTDsaVjcFANEzw&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_eoq_4&n=4)

[](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4ca_GN8PVgs7p4lFczZdWH4OS2J_wdNMUxMiFMEDAm6OhMzOXYWo73WEDpi0rxznYU5QuwBcS_PNTDsaVjcFANEzw&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_eoq_4&n=5)
If you help us with this goal, it will enable us to knock on even more doors, send out more flyers, and host more meet and greets across Pinellas. Help send this campaign to Washington, D.C.!
[](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4ca_GN8PVgs7p4lFczZdWH4OS2J_wdNMUxMiFMEDAm6OhMzOXYWo73WEDpi0rxznYU5QuwBcS_PNTDsaVjcFANEzw&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_eoq_4&n=6 "CONTRIBUTE HERE") [CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4ca_GN8PVgs7p4lFczZdWH4OS2J_wdNMUxMiFMEDAm6OhMzOXYWo73WEDpi0rxznYU5QuwBcS_PNTDsaVjcFANEzw&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_eoq_4&n=7)

Katie Trudeau

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, Our end-of-month deadline is at midnight tonight -- and I have an update for you on our goal: **[We're less than $8,000 away from our $50,000 goal. This is the last call: Will you make a donation of $5 or more right now to close the gap before our midnight end-of-month deadline?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9466?t=5&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9467?t=6&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9468?t=7&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9469?t=8&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9470?t=9&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9471?t=10&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9466?t=11&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX)
---
Until mid-June, I hadn't campaigned or fundraised since December. After the legislative fundraising freeze ended, the COVID-19 outbreak began and I have dedicated my energy and focus to combatting the virus.
I've been fighting tooth and nail for Washingtonians, just like I always have -- and attacks from Donald Trump and his GOP allies have only kept me laser focused on what counts: the families here in Washington state, how to keep them safe and healthy, and how we move our economy forward.
I won't let anyone or anything distract me from that work. But we still have an election this fall -- and I'm one of just four Democratic governorships that the Republican Governors Association has their eye on flipping. They've spent millions of dollars here in Washington state to try to unseat me before, and this year will be no different.
**We've beat back their attacks before, and we can do it again now.[That starts with hitting our $50,000 goal, and we're just $7,894 away: Will you donate $5 or more right now, before tonight's midnight deadline?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9466?t=12&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9466?t=13&akid=8088%2E868730%2EFPD_EX)
---

#
I know you're getting so many of these emails from every campaign that you have supported right now, but I wouldn't ask if it weren't so important.

Our campaign is less than $2,500 short of the goal we set for ourselves this quarter, and **I know that I can count on you to help get us over the top. **

The money that we raise today will help us get our message out to every single voter in this district. We know, like you do, that when voters hear our message, it resonates with them.

We've got less than 6 hours to raise $2,491, so I'll be quick. [Can you click here and chip in $15 to help us get there?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=d94c6cc69e&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
